title_zh: 投放前先做关键词研究: keywords 必须拆到 ad group 维度
summary_zh: Aaron 强调跑 Google Ads 前必须先完成 keyword research, 而且要把关键词拆到不同 campaign 和 ad group 里。原理: 一个 ad group 只放一个 keyword theme, 这样后续优化、预算分配、报表都能基于明确维度做决策, 而不是混在一起一团乱。Amazon 启示: SP keyword campaign 同样要按 keyword theme 分组而不是把 broad/phrase/exact 混在一个 campaign。
quote_en: before you even dive in and set up and start your google ads campaign you need to do your keyword research first and so much so that you need to have all of your keywords broken into different campaigns and ad groups

title_zh: 关键词研究先用 Google Doc 手写真实搜索词, 再进 Keyword Planner
summary_zh: Aaron 不直接打开 Keyword Planner, 而是先在 Google Doc 里手写自己作为消费者会搜的词 (e.g. pest control + 地区修饰词), 把这批种子词复制粘贴进 Keyword Planner discover new keywords 里。原理: 真实消费者搜索习惯比第三方算法更接近实际意图, 起手用真人语料能避免被工具误导扩到无关词。Amazon 启示: 做 SP keyword 调研时, listing copy 不该是唯一种子, 自己以买家身份搜一遍补全 long-tail。
quote_en: the way that I actually start this process and the way that I've always found I've had the most success in google ads campaigns is when I've actually completed before I've even gone into google ads and used the google search keyword tool

title_zh: 选词只看 trend 不看绝对值, 高竞争 + 高 CPC 直接砍
summary_zh: Keyword Planner 给的 monthly search / competition / top of page bid 都只反映过去趋势, 不是未来确定值。Aaron 决策方法: 高 search volume + low/medium competition + 可承受 CPC 的留下; 像 pest control 这种泛词竞争和单价都极高就主动放弃, 用 pest control + 地区 这种 mid-tail 词更划算。Amazon 启示: SP keyword 选词同理, head term 像 'water bottle' 卷不过大牌, 加品类/材质修饰的 long-tail ACoS 更友好。
quote_en: we look here some of these more targeted keywords like pest control sunshine coast and brisbane we've got some really good search volumes but the the the clicks are a little bit more a little bit cheaper as well

title_zh: One Keyword Theme 拆分: 同一类目按地区/属性独立 campaign
summary_zh: Aaron 把 keyword 导出成 csv 后, 加两列 (campaign / ad group), 把 'pest control brisbane' 和 'pest control gold coast' 拆到独立 campaign。原理: 不同地区可独立设预算; 报表能立刻看出哪个区域好哪个区域差; 写 ad copy 时 headline 可直接写 'pest control brisbane' 而不是泛词, 提高 CTR。Amazon 启示: 不同 ASIN/品类/受众应拆 campaign 而不是塞一个 campaign 多 ad group, 才能独立调预算和单价。
quote_en: by breaking it down and only having one keyword theme one single keyword theme in each of your ad groups it means that when you come to actually write your ad copy you you can become really really specific and really really targeted

title_zh: Keyword Theme 越细越好, 一个 ad group 只放一个主题
summary_zh: Aaron 反复强调 one keyword theme method: 单个 ad group 内只放一个关键词主题。好处四点: ad copy 可写得更精准提升 quality score; 能看清哪个 theme 出转化; 表现差的 theme 一键暂停而不会牵连其他词; 报表清晰。原理: ad group 是 Google Ads 的最小优化单元, 只有保持单一性才能做出基于数据的决策。Amazon 启示: SP keyword campaign 不要把 head + long-tail 混在一个 ad group, 拆开能精确停掉烧钱的词。
quote_en: for this method we only put one keyword theme into each ad group and this is very important for a number of reasons including that it makes it easier to write keyword focused ad copy for high quality keyword scores it allows you to very easily see which keyword themes are more successful in generating conversions

title_zh: Keyword Theme 拆得细 → ad copy 和 landing page 才能强相关
summary_zh: Aaron 用 Bali villa 案例: 把关键词拆成 'one bedroom villas bali / one bedroom villas seminyak / 2 bedroom villas / general bali' 等子主题, 每个 ad group 配独立 ad copy 和 landing page。原理: 搜 seminyak 的人看到 seminyak 文案 + 直接落到 seminyak 房型页, 转化路径最短; 用 generic 文案 CTR 和转化率都会掉。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 不能用一套创意打所有 ASIN, 不同卖点匹配不同搜索意图才能压低 ACoS。
quote_en: the benefit of this structure is that it means you can target your individual keyword themes with specific ad copy and also specific landing pages on your website

title_zh: Keyword Planner 数据只看 trend, 别死磕精确值
summary_zh: Aaron 提醒做 keyword research 时数据是动态的: 你研究完竞品大牌一进场, 所有 CPC/竞争度估算瞬间变。所以只看 trend 不看绝对数: 哪些词流量大、竞争重、CPC 走势如何。原理: 实时拍卖市场没有静态答案, 选词逻辑应基于相对优劣而不是某个具体 CPC 数字。Amazon 启示: SP 调研某词 'suggested bid 1.5 USD' 不可作为长期决策依据, 上线后要持续根据实际 ACoS 微调。
quote_en: don't get caught up on exact figures as you need to remember that all of the data that you're seeing is just reporting on past data trends and that this data can actually change by the time you press go on your campaign

title_zh: 选词三筛标准: 相关性 + 竞争度 + CPC 三关一起看
summary_zh: 在 Keyword Planner 里选词时 Aaron 三步过滤: (1) 相关性 e.g. 'free business cards' 对收费业务无意义直接砍; (2) 竞争度 high 单看不够; (3) competition high + top-of-page bid 双高的词砍掉, 否则烧不起。原理: 单一指标会误导, 三关同时通过的才进 plan。Amazon 启示: SP 选词同样要 ASIN 相关性 + suggested bid + impression share 三看, 高竞争词不一定要全部铺开。
quote_en: we are looking at is not only is this competition too high but if the competition is high and then also the top of page bid is too high we can leave that out of our campaign

title_zh: 导出 csv 后再次细拆主题: 一组拆成 4-5 个 ad group
summary_zh: Aaron 把 Keyword Planner 选好的 'signage' 一类导出 csv 后, 再用人工眼力拆成 'business signage / custom signs / outdoor signage / sign company near me' 等 4 个 ad group。原 'signage near me' 太宽直接删掉。原理: 工具导出的初步分组依然不够细, 必须人工二次拆分到极简主题, 每个 ad group 才能配高度匹配的 ad copy。Amazon 启示: SP 自动跑出来的 search term 报表也要人工二次拆主题再迁回 manual 精准词。
quote_en: now I'm actually now deciding that this keyword is actually too broad so I'm going to remove that keyword and just work on these four main keyword themes of business signage custom signs outdoor signage and sign company near me

title_zh: Match Type 已不再需要分 ad group, 只放一种类型即可
summary_zh: Google 2021 调整: broader match 现在自动包含 narrower match (broad 含 phrase 含 exact)。所以以前流行的 '同一关键词三种 match type 各开一个 ad group' 做法已经过时, 现在每个词只放一种 match type 就行。原理: Google 的撮合逻辑变了, 重复布词只会浪费预算和分散数据。Amazon 启示: SP 也存在 match type, 同一关键词的 broad / phrase / exact 不要堆在同一个 ad group, 选清楚目标后只用一种。
quote_en: broader match types capture all queries of narrower match types so what this actually means is if you're targeting a phrase match keyword google will now automatically also match any exact match keywords

title_zh: Exact Match 已变 'same meaning', 必须每周做 search term audit
summary_zh: Google 把 exact match 升级成语义匹配: 'lawn mowing service' 会触发 'grass cutting service'; 案例里 'all blacks headphones' 居然触发 'all blacks rugby jacket'。所以现在每 7 天必须查 search term 报告, 把无关词加成 negative keyword。原理: 语义匹配会引入 Google 自以为相关但实际无关的流量, 不主动屏蔽就持续烧预算。Amazon 启示: SP 同样要每周拉 search term 报表把无关 customer search 加进 negative keyword/ASIN, 这是 Amazon 投放最高 ROI 的优化动作之一。
quote_en: if you've got a highly specific product and a highly specific target market where you want to only be targeting search terms such as all blacks headphones what you need to do is you actually need to go through and do a search term audit every seven days

title_zh: Headlines 蓝色更醒目, ad copy 重点全压在 headline
summary_zh: Google 搜索结果里 headline 是蓝色加粗, description 是普通灰色文字。用户扫页面 headline 不抓眼球, description 根本不会被读, 更别提点击。所以写 ad copy 80% 精力放 headline (3 条 ×30 字符), description 配合即可。原理: 用户决策链路只有 1 秒不到, 视觉权重不平等。Amazon 启示: SB headline 也是同理, listing title 前 80 字符决定 CTR, 后面写得再细也没人看。
quote_en: your headlines are bold and blue so they stand out more than the descriptions so if your headlines do not grab their attention they won't even read your descriptions let alone click on your ad

title_zh: Headline 必须含 4 要素: keyword + brand + CTA + emotion
summary_zh: Aaron 经过多次 split test 沉淀的 headline 公式: (1) keyword focus (e.g. 'one bedroom seminyak villa'); (2) brand mention (花了广告费别浪费曝光机会); (3) strong CTA (call now / book now / save 45%); (4) emotional trigger (curiosity / humor / fear)。原理: keyword 是 Google quality score 喜欢的, 后三项是 user 喜欢的, 两边都满足才能做出高 CTR + 高 CVR 的 ad。Amazon 启示: SB/SD 创意文案也是这个逻辑, 单纯堆 keyword 太机械, 加品牌名 + 促销 hook 才会被点。
quote_en: the four things you need in your headlines is firstly you need to have keyword focus... the second thing is a brand mention... the other one is a strong call to action... and the last one is use emotional triggers

title_zh: Title Case 大写每个单词首字母, 提升 CTR 实测有效
summary_zh: ad copy 把每个单词首字母大写 (e.g. 'Book Your Appointment Now') 而不是 sentence case ('Book your appointment now')。WordStream 和 Periscopic 实测 title case 比 sentence case CTR 更高, 不违反 AdWords 政策。原理: 视觉上更突出, 在一堆小写竞品广告里更醒目。Amazon 启示: SB headline / brand store 标题用 title case 是免费的 CTR 优化, 几乎零成本可执行。
quote_en: two companies wordstream and periscopic have conducted studies into the effects of using title case on the click-through ratio ctr and found that ad copy with title case outperform sentence case

title_zh: Emotion + 反常 hook 比 discount 更出圈, skinny dip 案例
summary_zh: Aaron 的 Bali 别墅广告用 'skinny dip in your own pool' 当 headline, 因为别墅有 3 米高围墙带私人泳池。结果有客人专门来邮件确认 '我真的能裸泳吗？', 转化效果远超普通 discount 广告。原理: 行业里都在喊降价, 你用反差感 hook 创造心理画面 (curiosity), 让用户主动想象使用场景。Amazon 启示: 创意视频/A+ 不要全部都是 USP 罗列, 选一个反常使用场景 (e.g. 凉鞋穿去爬山) 反而记忆点更深。
quote_en: this has been the absolute knockout home run for us is that in our ad copy we were able to create some curiosity and humor by saying that you can skinny dip in your own pool

title_zh: ad copy 双重达标: Google 喜欢 + User 喜欢
summary_zh: Aaron 把 ad copy 评判拆成两个维度: Google likes (keyword focus 进 quality score, 影响排位) + User likes (CTA + emotional trigger, 影响 CTR)。两个都过关才有高 ROAS。常见失败案例是 ad copy 太机械, 只堆 keyword 通过审核, 但用户根本不点。原理: 算法和人是两个客户, 都得伺候好。Amazon 启示: SP/SB 创意要既包含买家搜索词 (relevance score), 又有点击欲望钩子 (折扣 / 痛点)。
quote_en: you don't only need to focus on what google likes because you also need to focus on what the user likes... most ads fail down is that they're too robotic and there's no point getting an ad that gets shown all the time if people actually don't click on it

title_zh: 用 'Guaranteed Best Price' 化解第三方比价的恐惧情绪
summary_zh: 酒店行业用户被 Booking.com 等比价站训练成永远在比价, Aaron 在自己的直营广告 headline 加 'Guaranteed Best Price' 直接消解这种 fear。原理: 用户犹豫的根因往往是怕买贵 / 怕买错, 写一句保证语句直接砸掉这个犹豫点, 转化率明显提升。Amazon 启示: listing 卡片 / SB 创意可以用 'Lowest Price On Amazon' / '30-Day Money Back' 这类反 fear 文案, 比单纯说卖点更打动人。
quote_en: we were able to actually pull on that fear emotion with this last headline of guaranteed best price and what this actually did is it actually removed the fear with a guarantee

title_zh: RSA pinning: 把验证过的 headline 钉在固定位置
summary_zh: RSA 默认让 Google AI 随机组合 15 个 headline 和 4 个 description, 但单 ad group 没 5000 月曝光时 AI 永远学不完。Aaron 的解法: 用 pin 功能把已验证的高转化 headline 钉到 position 1/2/3, 让 RSA 表现得像 ETA。原理: 在数据不够喂 AI 时, 人工经验 > AI 探索。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 没有 pin 但有创意权重控制, 高 ROAS 的素材应该手动加预算固定跑, 不要全交给系统优化。
quote_en: even though you have the ability of adding up to 15 different headlines and up to four different descriptions you can still create an ad where you're only adding three headlines and then google also gives you the option to pin those headlines in either position one two or three

title_zh: RSA split test 双 ad 法: 一个全开 + 一个 pin 固定
summary_zh: Aaron 推荐 RSA split test 路径: 在同 ad group 里建两个 RSA, 一个完全不 pin (让 Google 自由组合), 另一个 pin 死特定 headline/description。对比两者的 CTR/CVR, 找出真正赢家后, 把 winner 元素回填到第一个 ad。原理: 同时利用 AI 探索 + 人工固化, 数据闭环可控。Amazon 启示: SP 创意 split test 也是这逻辑, 同 ad group 跑 2-3 个素材竞争, 表现最好的留下并扩增预算。
quote_en: the second option to complete split testing with the response of search ads would be to have one responsive search ad which has no pinned headlines and no pin descriptions and then you would have a secondary response to search ad which would have some pinned headlines and pin descriptions

title_zh: Google AI 学习需 5000 月曝光, 中小账号根本喂不饱
summary_zh: RSA learning phase 需要 5000 impressions / 30 天才能给出 performance 评级。中小广告主单 ad group 远达不到, 所以 RSA 永远卡在学习状态, AI 给不出靠谱组合, CPC/CPA 失控。Aaron 实测案例: 某 RSA cost-per-conversion 181 USD vs ETA 50 USD。原理: AI 缺数据 = 瞎决策。Amazon 启示: SP 自动定向同样需要数据冷启动, 中小预算账号别全押 auto, 应该 manual 锁定已验证的关键词。
quote_en: in order for google to finish its learning phase so that it's ai can actually know which headlines and descriptions to show it actually needs 5,000 impressions in a 30-day period the problem for most small and medium businesses is that individual ad groups get nowhere near 5000 impressions

title_zh: Pin 操作把 RSA cost/conversion 从 181 砍到 39
summary_zh: Aaron 案例: 一个 RSA 原本 cost/conv 181 USD, 他用之前 ETA 时代沉淀的 winner CTA ('from just 39/month' + 'month-to-month contracts') 通过 pin 钉死位置, 结果 cost/conv 降到 39 USD。原理: 把历史验证过的高转化文案锁住位置, 等于把 ETA 的稳定性叠加到 RSA 的形式上, 拿两边好处。Amazon 启示: 不要因为新形式就丢掉旧 winner 文案, 历史 ROAS 高的卖点该用还得用。
quote_en: we made a really simple change and we started actually pinning in some of our headlines and also some of our descriptions... since we've made those changes we've been able to see the cost per conversion for this responsive search ad reduced from 181 dollars all the way down to 39

title_zh: Google 目标: 把单一 search query 匹配到唯一 landing page
summary_zh: Aaron 解释 Google 的核心目标: 在 500 亿网页里把用户搜索匹配到最佳页面。所以你的账号结构应该镜像这个目标: account → campaign → ad group (单 keyword theme) → 独立 ad copy + 独立 landing page。原理: 你的结构越贴合 Google 的撮合逻辑, quality score 越高, CPC 越低。Amazon 启示: SP 的 ad group 也要按 ASIN 关联词分组, 让搜索 → 创意 → 落地 ASIN 形成 1:1 映射。
quote_en: google wants to match what the person searches with the best web page on the internet... so to give your google ads campaign the best chance for success making sure that your ads are matching those individual search enquiries your campaign structure needs to look like this

title_zh: Optimization 必须有 schedule, 不同动作不同频率
summary_zh: Aaron 把 Google Ads 优化类比健身: 健身教练不会让你天天 bench press, 同样优化也不能每天瞎调。他的节奏: search term audit / keyword 每周 1-2 次; audience 和 bid optimization 每 45-60 天才动一次。原理: 不同维度需要不同样本积累周期, 高频盯短期数据反而会被噪声误导。Amazon 启示: SP 调价不要每天调, 每周看趋势再动手, ASIN target / audience 这种长周期动作 30-45 天看一次足够。
quote_en: you need to know what you need to optimize in google every 72 hours every week every month every 90 days and even every year... for some items like search term audits and checking your keywords they need to be checked and optimized once or twice every week versus when you're checking your audiences and your bid optimizations you don't need to check those until every sort of 45 or 60 days

title_zh: Audiences in observation mode + bid adjustment 把 ROAS 从 1.5 拉到 8
summary_zh: Aaron 接手一个 Shopping campaign, 14 天内把 ROAS 从 1.5 提到 8 的关键动作: 在 ad group 加 audiences 但用 observation mode (不是 targeting), 这样不会限缩流量, 只是给 Google 多一个数据维度报表; 14 天后看哪些 audience 转化好, 用正向 bid adjustment 加价。原理: observation 模式下 audience 只是观察口, 不会过早收窄流量, 等数据足够再用 bid 加权才不浪费学习期。Amazon 启示: SD/SP 的 audience targeting 也建议先广撒后用 bid 加权, 不要一上来就排他锁定。
quote_en: we added these audiences to the campaign as observations and not actually as targeting... what this allowed us to do is to actually understand which one of these audiences was converting really well and then to be able to put a positive bid adjustment on those audiences

title_zh: 受众别只锁 niche, 出乎意料的 audience 反而是赢家
summary_zh: Aaron 在某美发产品 Shopping campaign 里加了一堆 audience, 结果转化最好的不是 'hair care enthusiasts' 这类 niche audience, 而是 'luxury shoppers' 和 'family film fans' 这类看起来无关的兴趣群。原理: 用户的实际购买路径常常和品牌假设的不一样, 只锁 niche 会漏掉真实买家画像。Amazon 启示: SD audience targeting 不要只选 'in-market for X' 这种最直接的细分, 应该铺一些跨品类兴趣 audience 用 observation 模式跑数据。
quote_en: we don't only just want to add audiences within your niche because you just don't know how some of those other audiences are going to perform... we found that some of the more successful audiences were actually luxury shoppers and family film fans

title_zh: Audience 报表里 'Other' 占比高 = 你漏加了关键 audience
summary_zh: Aaron 检查 audience 报告必看一行: 'Other'。这一行代表流量来自你没添加的 audience segment。如果 Other 占比超过 10%, 说明你的 audience 覆盖不足, 需要继续添加新 audience 直到 Other 降到 10% 以下、自定义 audience 覆盖率 90%+ 才能做精准 bid 优化。原理: 没数据维度就没法决策, Other 是 Google 在告诉你 '你看不到的部分还很大'。Amazon 启示: SD audience 报表如果有大量未归类流量, 也要主动扩 audience 池来获取可优化粒度。
quote_en: the first thing you need to do is to look at this 'other' row... what that means is that there are people who are visiting your website and clicking on your ads who don't fit into any of the audiences that you've added... we want to be aiming for at least over 90 percent of all of our website traffic from our google ads to fit into one of these audiences

title_zh: Audience bid 调整决策: cost/conv vs 账号均值 + impression share 双重判断
summary_zh: Aaron 决定给某 audience 加 bid 的两道闸门: (1) 该 audience 的 cost/conversion 是否低于账号整体均值 (好于均值才值得加价); (2) search impression share 是否还有上升空间 (已经 100% 就没必要加价烧钱)。两条都满足才上调 bid 10-20%。原理: 单看转化好不够, 必须同时确认还有流量可以拿, 否则只是空烧 CPC。Amazon 启示: SP keyword 调价同理, 高 ROAS + impression share 还低的词才值得加价, 已经 top of search 100% 的不用动。
quote_en: we want to look at our search impression share to see if there's any further opportunity to grow the impressions we're getting from this audience as well... if we're already at 100 percent search impression share with this audience there's no point of putting on a positive bid adjustment because we're not going to get any more impressions

title_zh: 投放前先把 detailed demographics 和 audience 加上, 喂算法快速冷启动
summary_zh: Aaron 强调一个反直觉做法: 不要等开始投放后再加 audience 和 detailed demographics, 而是 launch 前就在 ad group 里把这些都加上 observation 模式。婴儿奶粉案例: 提前加 'parents of infants/toddlers/preschoolers' demographics, 让 Google 算法第一天就能知道往哪些群体去优化。原理: 算法冷启动期是最缺数据的, 提前给画像信号能加速 learning phase。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 创建时就要把品类相关的 lifestyle / in-market audience 都铺上 observation, 不要等跑了几周再补。
quote_en: what most google advertisers don't do but they should be doing is they should be adding their detailed demographics and audiences to their ad groups before they actually start running their campaigns... if you're selling baby formula you would want to add things such as detailed demographic of parents with infants

title_zh: 提升 CTR 直接压低 CPC: Google 只在被点击时赚钱
summary_zh: Aaron 揭穿底层逻辑: Google 只有用户点击 ad 才能赚到钱, 所以高 CTR 的广告对 Google 更值钱, 系统会用更低 CPC 优先展示。反之 CTR 低的广告 Google 会要求更高 CPC 来弥补。所以盯紧 CTR 优化 (改 headline / 加 CTA / 测 emotional hook) 等于在直接降 CPC。原理: 拍卖系统的 quality score 里 expected CTR 是核心权重之一。Amazon 启示: SP/SB 的 CPC 也跟 CTR 挂钩, 提升点击率不光是省广告费, 还能直接拿到更便宜的位置。
quote_en: the higher the click-through rate of your ad the lower the cost per click is going to be for that ad and the reason for that is google only gets paid when someone actually clicks on the ad so they want to show ads which actually generate clicks

title_zh: 高单价/复杂表单类目按 device 加价, 电脑端往往比手机更值钱
summary_zh: Aaron 跑过的复杂表单 / 高客单价产品 (e.g. 保险、B2B) 在电脑端转化率明显高于手机端, 因为人在大屏才愿意填长表单。所以这类产品应在 device 报告里给 computer 加正向 bid adjustment、手机端反而降; 反过来低客单价 / 简单结账产品手机端转化好。原理: 不同设备的用户场景和动机不一样, 一刀切定价是浪费。Amazon 启示: SD 的 device 设置可以用同样思路, 高客单价 ASIN 加权 desktop, 冲动消费类 ASIN 加权 mobile。
quote_en: if you're selling a higher priced item or you're requiring a contact form which has more details on it then you may find that you'd actually want to put a positive bid adjustment on computers... whereas if your products are very low priced or you're really only just trying to drive someone to make a phone call you might find that mobiles work for you better

title_zh: 小预算策略: 地理范围收窄到 1-4 个区域, 避免铺得太广
summary_zh: Aaron 反复强调, 小预算 (如每天 $20-30) 最大的错误就是把投放范围设成整个城市。建议只锁定 1-4 个最赚钱的郊区/邮编。同理迁移到 Amazon SP/SD: 低预算时不要勾选 'auto-targeting + 全美', 应集中预算在 1-3 个最匹配的关键词组 (exact / phrase) 或一个高 ROAS 的 ASIN-target, 让有限的展示量都花在最相关的位置上, 而不是被算法稀释到泛流量里。
quote_en: if you've got a small budget the worst thing you can do is target the entire city pick one to four suburbs and own them

title_zh: 选搜索量更低、CPC 更便宜的关键词主题, 避开烧钱大词
summary_zh: 案例: 水管工小预算客户不要碰 'emergency plumbing' (CPC $15-20, 预算秒烧光), 而是去做 'drainage installation' / 'gas fitting' 这类长尾低 CPC 词, 单价低、转化意图明确、竞争小。Amazon 类比: 新品 / 小预算不要去打 BSR Top 10 大词 (CPC $3+), 而是先打 long-tail exact 关键词或竞品 ASIN-target (CPC $0.5-1), 同样预算能拿到 5-10 倍展示量, 并积累更干净的转化数据喂给 A9。
quote_en: don't go after the high volume keyword themes find the lower volume cheaper ones where you can actually win

title_zh: Location 选 'Presence' 而非 'Interest', 避免预算外溢
summary_zh: Google Ads 默认地理定位是 'Presence or Interest', 即使用户不在你的目标区域, 只要他搜索过相关地点也会触发广告——对小预算是灾难。必须切到 'Presence only', 只投真正在目标区域的人。Amazon 同构问题: Sponsored Display 的 audience targeting 默认会扩展到相似受众, 小预算应关掉 expanded targeting, 确保钱花在精确受众/关键词上。
quote_en: switch from presence or interest to presence only otherwise you're paying for tire-kickers who just searched the area

title_zh: Ad Rank = Max CPC × Quality Score: CTR 高的低出价者反而排名更前
summary_zh: Aaron 用具体数字打脸 'bid 越高越好' 的迷思: 竞争对手出价 $5、CTR 3%、QS 5/10 → Ad Rank 15; 你出价 $2、CTR 12%、QS 9/10 → Ad Rank 18, 你赢且 CPC 更低。Amazon SP 的 Impression Share 逻辑高度类似: A9 优先给 CVR/CTR 高的广告位, 提升 listing 主图 CTR + ASIN CVR 比单纯加 bid 更有效降低 ACOS。
quote_en: you can pay two dollars and beat the guy paying five if your click-through rate and quality score are higher ad rank wins not raw bid

title_zh: Quality Score 至少 8/10: 关键词必须同时出现在标题、描述、落地页
summary_zh: QS 低于 7 就放弃这个关键词。提升 QS 三要素: (1) 关键词写进 RSA headline 至少 1-2 条; (2) 关键词写进 description; (3) 落地页 H1 + 首屏 copy 含该关键词。Amazon 类比: listing relevance score 同样靠关键词在 title / bullets / A+ / backend 多处一致出现, 不要为了 SEO 堆砌无关词, A9 会扣关联度分。
quote_en: aim for eight to ten on quality score the keyword needs to be in your headline in your description and on your landing page all three

title_zh: 前 30-60 天用 broad match 收数据, 再每 3-4 天 audit search terms 升级到 phrase/exact
summary_zh: 新账号或新词组前 30-60 天先用 broad (纯 broad, 不是 broad modifier) 让 Google 喂搜索词数据, 每 3-4 天去 Search Terms Report, 高 CVR 的词加进 phrase/exact campaign 加价, 烂词加 negative。Amazon SP 完全可复刻: 自动广告 14-30 天收 search term → 高转化词搬到手动 exact 加价、烂词加 exact negative, 形成 auto → manual exact 双层漏斗。
quote_en: run broad for the first thirty to sixty days then every three to four days audit your search terms promote the winners to phrase or exact kill the rest with negatives

title_zh: 每个 ad group 至少 3 条 RSA: 1 条不 pin + 2 条战略性 pin, 小账号别等 Google 自动测试
summary_zh: ETA 在 2022/06/30 退场后, Aaron 强制每个 ad group 上 3 条 RSA: 第 1 条 headline 全开放让 Google 自由组合; 第 2-3 条把品牌词 / 主关键词 pin 到 H1+H2 锁定结构。原因是 Google 'Optimize' 的自动测试要每月 ~5000 impression 才能产出胜出 ad, 小账号根本跑不到, 只能靠人工多版本同时上去抢曝光。Amazon SB 类比: 一个 SB campaign 上 3-4 条 creative variant (不同 headline / lifestyle 主图), 别等 Amazon 自动选优, 主动跑 14 天看 CTR 自己淘汰。
quote_en: you need at least three rsas per ad group one with no pinned headlines and two with your brand and main keyword pinned because small accounts never hit the five thousand impressions google needs to finish testing

title_zh: Phrase / Exact match 现在匹配 '含义' 不是 '词': 必须每周 audit search terms 否则烧钱
summary_zh: Google 把 phrase / exact 的匹配逻辑从 '含同样词' 改成 '含同样含义'。例子: 你出 'fluffy earmuffs' phrase, 现在会被 'soft ear warmers' / 'plush headbands' 触发; 出 'lawn care' exact 会触发 'grass maintenance'。后果: 即使你用 exact 也会跑出大量无关词, 必须每周拉 search term report 加 negative。Amazon SP 没有 'meaning match' 这层风险 (exact 还是 exact), 但自动广告的 'close match' / 'loose match' 行为类似 Google broad, 同样要每周 audit。
quote_en: phrase and exact now match the meaning not just the words your fluffy earmuffs exact will trigger soft ear warmers if you don't pull negatives weekly google will eat your budget

title_zh: Pinning 策略: H1 = 品牌词, H2 = 主关键词, 其他 headline 让 Google 自由组合
summary_zh: Aaron 的 RSA pin 公式: position 1 固定 1-2 条品牌 headline (建立信任 + 防竞品蹭); position 2 固定 2-3 条核心关键词 headline (保证相关性 / QS); position 3 完全开放给 Google 测 USP / promo / CTA。这样既锁定 ad rank 计算需要的关键词信号, 又留出空间让 AI 优化。Amazon SB headline copy 同样可以 '品牌名 + 核心词 + 利益点' 三段式锁定, 但 Amazon 不允许 dynamic insertion, 所以建议直接做 3-5 条静态 SB 跑 A/B。
quote_en: pin your brand to position one your main keyword to position two and leave position three completely open that's how you control structure and still let google optimize

title_zh: 5 大优化板块的不同节奏: search term 72h / ad weekly+monthly / QS monthly / bid+audience 90 天
summary_zh: Aaron 的核心反直觉观点: 不同优化项要按 Google AI 学习速度匹配节奏, 频繁改 bid 反而拖累机器学习。完整 cadence: (1) Search terms 每 72 小时 (烧钱最快); (2) Ad copy review 每周 + 月度深度; (3) Quality Score 每月扫一次低分词; (4) Bid / audience / demographics 每 90 天才能动 (AI 需要时间 relearn); (5) Conversion / location / goal 每季度复核。Amazon 同理: SP bid 频繁改会重置 placement 学习, 建议 7 天观察 + 14 天微调; ASIN 主图 / A+ 改完后给 28 天 attribution window。
quote_en: search terms every seventy-two hours ads weekly quality score monthly but bids and audiences only every ninety days because google's ai needs time to learn

title_zh: Search term audit 在 ad group 级别用 7 天窗口看 ~100 行, keyword audit 用 30 天窗口找 outlier
summary_zh: 粒度选择决定信噪比: search term 必须在 ad group 级别拉 (campaign 级别会混入不同主题词), 用 7 天窗口扫 ~100 行(高 cost / 0 conv 的直接 negative); 而 keyword 自身的表现要拉 30 天 (样本太小 CPA 会失真), 重点看高 CPC 或高 cost-per-conversion 的 outlier 决定降价或暂停。Amazon SP search term report 同样建议: auto / broad campaign 用 7 天扫无关 ASIN/ 词加 negative, 关键词 ACoS 表现用 30 天加 placement modifier。
quote_en: pull search terms at the ad group level over seven days about a hundred rows but for keywords use thirty days you need a bigger sample for cpa to be reliable

title_zh: 纪律性 cadence 实战: 6 个月 23 → 135 conv/月 (4.5x), CPC 从 $4.20 → $1.75
summary_zh: Aaron 展示的真实账号: 没有改预算, 没有上新 campaign, 只是按 cadence 表执行 6 个月 — search term audit 每 72h, ad copy 每周, 大改动每 90 天 — 月转化 23 → 135 (4.5x), CPC 从 $4.20 降到 $1.75 (-58%)。结论: 大多数账号不是缺新策略, 是缺纪律和正确节奏。Amazon 同样: 大量卖家每天手动改 bid / 关广告, 反而打乱 placement 学习; 改成固定每周一次的 audit cadence + 90 天战略性调整 ACoS / TACoS 通常能跑赢 '勤奋型' 操盘。
quote_en: no new campaigns no new budget just disciplined cadence took this account from twenty-three to one hundred thirty-five conversions and dropped cpc from four twenty to one seventy-five in six months

title_zh: Ad group 必须按 keyword theme 切分: 'men's shoes' / 'women's shoes' / 'kids shoes' 各自独立 copy
summary_zh: Aaron 把一个 'shoes' campaign 拆成 3 个 ad group, 每个 ad group 只放一个主题的关键词 + 该主题的 headline / description。原因: RSA 的 Quality Score 来自关键词与 ad copy 的相关性, 把男鞋 / 女鞋 / 童鞋混进同一个 ad group, copy 必然泛化, QS 全线下滑。Amazon SP 完全适用: 不要把 'yoga mat'+'foam roller'+'resistance band' 放进同一手动 campaign, 应按 product variation / use case 拆 ad group, 每组 keyword 独立, 这样自动出价 / placement 学习更精准, ASIN 关联度也更高。
quote_en: you don't want everything crammed into one campaign or one ad group structure them into different keyword themes so the ad copy actually matches what the searcher typed

title_zh: 新 campaign 头 30-60 天先用 'Maximize Clicks', 拿到转化数据后才切 'Maximize Conversions'
summary_zh: Aaron 反对新账号一开始就用 conversion-based bidding (Maximize Conversions / tCPA / tROAS): Google 算法需要历史转化样本才能学习, 没数据就上 conversion bidding 会导致曝光骤降 + 成本失控。正确路径: 头 30-60 天用 Manual CPC 或 Maximize Clicks 收集 50+ 转化样本, 再切 Maximize Conversions。Amazon SP 同理: 新 ASIN / 新 campaign 头 14-30 天用 Dynamic bid down only 或 Fixed bid 收集转化数据, 等 ACoS 稳定后再切 'Dynamic bid up and down' 让算法激进出价, 否则 Amazon 算法会把预算烧在 placement 学习上。
quote_en: don't start with maximize conversions you need at least thirty to sixty days of data first start with clicks then switch when google has enough conversions to learn from

title_zh: Audience segments 设为 'Observation' 不是 'Targeting': 先观察哪个受众转化好再加价
summary_zh: Aaron 强烈反对一开始就用 'Targeting' 模式锁死受众 (会大幅压缩流量), 推荐用 'Observation' 模式: 受众层只是观察标签, 不限制谁能看到广告, 跑 30-60 天后看哪个 in-market / affinity 受众 CVR 最高, 再对该层加 bid modifier (+20~+50%)。Amazon SP/SD 类比: 'Audiences' targeting 在 SD 里同样可以先用 broad reach + observation 视角看哪些 lifestyle / interest 受众转化好, 再单独 build 一个 high-bid SD audience campaign 加价收割, 不要一上来就锁死单一 audience segment。
quote_en: set audience segments to observation not targeting at the start you don't know yet who's converting let google show you then bid up the winners

title_zh: Search 广告必须关掉 Display Network + Search Partners, 否则数据被稀释
summary_zh: Google Ads 默认勾选 'Search Network partners' 和 'Display Network', 把你的 search budget 推到 AOL / 第三方搜索框 / 横幅展示位, CTR 和 CVR 完全不同, 但数据混在一起报告, 让你误判 search campaign 表现。Aaron 一律取消勾选, 只跑纯 Google search。Amazon 类比: SP campaign 跑搜索结果位 + 商品页位 (placement) 表现差异极大, 必须用 'Top of Search' / 'Product Pages' / 'Rest of Search' 的 placement modifier 单独看 ROAS, 不要看 campaign 总均值; 必要时把 product page placement 单独建 SD campaign 跑。
quote_en: always uncheck search partners and display network on a search campaign they dilute your data and the performance is completely different

title_zh: 用 max bid limit 修剪异常高价 click 而非压住整盘出价
summary_zh: Smart Bidding 大多数时候比人工好,但偶尔会在个别 auction 出爆炸 CPC(平均 2 块的词被拍到 20 块)。Andrew 的最常用打法是把 max bid 设在 1.2-1.8 倍平均 CPC,只削掉最贵的尖峰,不影响中低价 auction。这与 seasonal bid adjustment 的等比例下调不同——后者会让本来就低的出价掉出 auction、丢量;max bid 只压顶,数据完整,适合表现差时给算法降速但不锁死。
quote_en: Paying $20 for a keyword that normally is $2 in average cost per click is just wasteful. The way that I use max bidding limits the most is when I encounter poor performance. I just put a max bid limit. Maybe I put it at 1.5x the average CPC.

title_zh: max bid 设太狠会触发死亡螺旋,3 个月后利润绝对值反掉
summary_zh: 测试在多个国家/campaign 同时压 1x 平均 CPC 的激进 max bid:前 2 个月 click 只掉 15%、利润率涨 15-30% 看起来很美;但 conversion 量掉 33%,被锁出最优质 auction。3 个月后进入下行螺旋,Google 端和后端数据同时变差,即使 ROAS 漂亮,绝对利润也开始下滑。激进压价只能短期(过完 BFCM 时)用,长期必死。
quote_en: We lost approximately 15% of clicks which doesn't seem like that much because we saw a 15 to 30% better profit. However, and this is was the key thing, conversions dropped by 33%. What this means is that we're getting locked out of the best auctions.

title_zh: 拒绝信 Google rep:limited by bid limit 不等于丢 76% auction
summary_zh: Google rep 常拿 Smart Bidding 报告里的 limited by bid limit 76% 来劝你松开限制,声称你丢了 76% 的 auction。Andrew 实测多年:max bid 真实含义只是 76% 的 auction 里 Smart Bidding 想出更高价但被你压住,不是被踢出。但 minimum bid limit 才是真正会让你直接掉出 auction 的设置——文档没写,实操中拿掉 min bid 反而流量上涨。结论:听 rep 话之前先看自己后台数据。
quote_en: What it means is that in 76% of the auctions that you have been in, smart bidding could have been bidding higher for it. It doesn't mean that you've dropped out of 76% of the auctions you could have been in completely.

title_zh: 接手老账户先批量删 negative keywords,5/8 案例后表现反而提升
summary_zh: 很多 agency 留下的老账户里堆了大量 negative keywords(尤其是 keyword sculpting / cannibalization 那一套互相排斥的列表)。Andrew 的 Savvy Revenue 过去一年接手的 8 个账户里有 5 个直接清光所有 negative,全部表现优于以往;有家从某 agency 拿过来的客户连续多次复现同一结论,year-over-year 涨 50%。逻辑:keyword 之所以走到 DSA/别的 campaign 是因为 ad rank/quality score 不够,你强行加 negative 等于把它彻底压没。删除时配合略高 budget(+20%) 和 max CPC limits 防止失控,或一周删 10-20% 慢慢释放。
quote_en: The amount of accounts that we've taken in the last year maybe five and again we don't take more than eight accounts in a year maybe five five of those eight have all had all negative negative keywords removed and all have outperformed after.

title_zh: 看 search term match type 报告,而不是 keyword match type
summary_zh: 大部分人看 broad/phrase/exact 表现是按 keyword match type 来汇总,会得出 broad 花了 30-40% 预算 ROAS 还可以的结论。但同样数据切成 search term match type(用户实际搜索词跟你的 keyword 是 exact / close variant / broad 哪种关系)往往会发现 60-80% 的 broad keyword 花费实际命中的还是 exact 搜索词——也就是说就算关掉 broad,你也能拿到同样的搜索量。要判断 broad 到底带没带新增量,必须再下钻到 campaign 级,看哪些 campaign 的 broad ROAS 是 1x 这种级别。
quote_en: When you actually look at, okay, if you didn't have broad match you would have hit 90% of the same search terms anyways. In this case, it's performing like we want. Some campaigns the ROAS was like 1x on broad match. So really removing it in those cases made sense.

title_zh: 搜索量饱和后再加预算只会推高 CPC,要承认天花板
summary_zh: 客户老说要 grow,加预算却只换来 CPC 上涨没新增 conversion——先去看 search impression share 这一列。如果非品牌词都已经 90% 了,意味着真实世界搜你这个东西的人你已经覆盖完了,smart bidding exploration / broad match / AI Max 都救不了你,因为没有新搜索可以挖。这时不是去乱开自动化,而是要承认天花板,告诉客户:要么扩 SKU/品类、要么换渠道(Demand Gen / 站外),或者进入 maintenance 模式降 fee 等下一波增长机会。这是顾问最被低估的能力——如实说话。
quote_en: We added the search impression share column. It was 90% search impression share for non-brand search. You have reached all the people searching. There are real people in the real world who are typing things into Google and you're reaching them all. There is no money to spend here.

title_zh: 用 holdout / 地区分组测 brand 词的增量,而不是看 ROAS
summary_zh: brand bidding 该不该投不存在通用答案,要看 incrementality:这笔 conversion 不投 brand 词会不会照样发生。最干净的做法是按地理区分两组,一组开 brand 一组关,看后端总 conversion 差多少;次选是停一周开一周交替几次。直接看 brand campaign 的 8x/20x ROAS 没意义——那是用户本来就要找你的钱。也千万不要混 new vs existing customer 那个维度进来,那是另一个问题。
quote_en: Instead of asking, should I be bidding for my brand? The better question to ask is, well, is brand bidding incremental for me? Would the conversion have happened anyway? And the only way to actually test this is to do a holdout test.

title_zh: brand 词用手动出价更划算,smart bidding 的优势在 brand 上失效
summary_zh: Smart bidding 厉害的场景是大量 keyword、转化率波动大、竞争多——brand 词全反过来:几个词、转化率稳定、几乎没竞争。这种场景下 smart bidding 会把 CPC 报到远高于必要值。Andrew 用 experiment 把 brand bid 直接砍 50% 测试,impression / click / revenue 都没掉,直接省一半成本,统计显著。所以大品牌账户上 brand 词省一半 CPC 完全可能,只是大家没去测。例外是 brand shopping campaign,SKU 多+和经销商抢流量,smart bidding 才有意义。
quote_en: Big brands can save big bucks on shaving off half their CPCs and have no impact on clicks whatsoever. Smart bidding works great when there's a lot of competitors per keyword. However, for branded keywords, the opposite is the case. You have very few competitors, very stable conversion rates, five keywords, 10, 20 keywords tops.

title_zh: brand 必须从 PMax 排除,否则 PMax 就是把钱往 brand 词倒
summary_zh: 90% 的 DTC 品牌从 Meta 转到 Google 后说 Google 不行,不是 Google 不行,是因为没把 brand term 从 PMax 里排除。一旦月预算到 1-5 万美金,PMax 会把绝大部分预算自动倒进 brand 词,然后看起来 ROAS 很漂亮但其实零增量。规则:有点知名度的品牌一律 exclude;只有刚起步、几乎没人搜你的新品牌可以不管。同时 brand vs non-brand 的 ROAS 报表必须分开,绝对不要合并——合并后没人能为非品牌负责。
quote_en: The reason why 90% of DTC brands can't get Google ads to work is because they don't exclude brand terms when they start spending $10,000, $50,000 a month. The majority goes into brand terms in PMAX. If you're an existing brand, for goodness sake, exclude.

title_zh: shopping feed 用 item_group_id 把变体聚合,不要瞎删 variant
summary_zh: 网上很多人说 shopping feed 要砍 variant 简化数据,Andrew 反对:多数情况砍 variant 反而伤覆盖,因为只留一个尺码/颜色的话只要那个 SKU 缺货整个 product 在 Google 就不展示了。基础动作只有一个——给所有同款变体打 item_group_id,Google 自然会聚合数据。只有当一个产品超过 15 个 variant、且 smart bidding 数据被打散到没法分析时,才考虑去重。即便去重也要保留有人搜的差异维度(颜色/材质),并且写好 fallback 规则:首选 variant 缺货时自动切到有货的同组变体,否则会被判 disapproved。
quote_en: If you're only advertising for the black size large t-shirt and it goes out of stock even though all other sizes are available then Google will not show anything. The simple thing whenever you work with product variants, this is not rocket science, you add the item group ID to group similar variants together.

title_zh: 测试 feed 改动只看 traffic 是否稳,不要纠结 ROAS / impression share
summary_zh: 做 feed 层面的改动(去重 variant、改 title、调 attribute)时,大量人盯着 ROAS 和 conversion rate 慌着回滚——这是错的,smart bidding 还没学过来这些指标没意义。Andrew 的判断标准只有一个:traffic 是否稳定。流量没掉就继续,流量明显掉立即回滚。先在 20% 的 SKU 上小范围跑,traffic 没异常再扩到全量。impression share 这种指标在多 SKU 跨产品比对里噪音太大,不要看。
quote_en: If you got a big catalog test for goodness sakes test this on 20% of products first. Don't obsess over conversion rates or ROAS during testing because it will not have that big of an impact on smart bidding's algorithms initially. The goal is if traffic stays the same because we can track that really really easily then that's the goal.

title_zh: 全部塞 PMax 那一套是把 search/shopping 用同一个 ROAS 目标喂
summary_zh: Google rep 一直推 consolidate 到一个 PMax 让 AI 分配预算,Andrew 拉数据直接打脸:同一个账户 search 和 shopping 的最优 ROAS 目标本就不同——shopping 通常能撑更高 ROAS,search 给同样目标会被压到只占 5% 预算(健康水位是 20-28%)。这意味着 PMax 一刀切的 ROAS 让 search 永远跑不出量。要 grow 必须拆开:search 用自己的目标和 max CPC,shopping 用自己的;其次 bestseller / 不盈利 / longtail 三档产品也不该共用 ROAS。
quote_en: Some accounts run search and shopping where 5% of the spend goes into search where others are at a much more healthy 28%, 20%, 22%. Shopping will routinely be able to produce a higher ROAS than search. So setting the same ROAS target is insufficient for growth.

title_zh: PMax 的 display/video 不是上漏斗流量,而是 retargeting
summary_zh: 很多人以为开 PMax 等于自动跑上漏斗 awareness,因为里面包了 display 和 video。Andrew 反对:PMax 的 display 和 video 跟 search/shopping 共用同一个 ROAS 目标,要在那个 ROAS 下达标只能跑 retargeting,push 渠道≠上漏斗。所以指望 PMax 帮你做 awareness 然后回流到 search,逻辑根本不成立。PMax 唯一真正的好处是:聚合数据给 smart bidding 学习 + 让没跑过 DSA 的账户多吃 10-30% 搜索流量。
quote_en: This assumption is a very common misunderstanding. So in order to hit the same ROAS target for display as you're doing on search, then you need to do retargeting. So just because we're it's push advertising like display video doesn't mean we're actively targeting people at the top of the funnel.

title_zh: PMax 性能掉了你没工具能修——要预留 standalone 框架
summary_zh: PMax 跑得好的时候没人在意黑盒,但常见周期是 3/6/12/18 个月后开始 stagnate 或下滑。这时候 PMax 给你的杠杆只有改预算、改 ROAS 目标、调 asset group 这几个伪动作,没法定位是 brand / category / money keyword 哪一层在垮、是 search 还是 shopping 在掉。standalone search + standalone shopping(每个 bid strategy 至少 300 转化/月)虽然门槛高,但能 (1) 跑 ad/landing page 测试 (2) 给不同 keyword 设不同 ROAS 目标 (3) 出问题时定位修复。所以最好早期就把核心 SKU 拆出来 standalone,别全压 PMax。
quote_en: Everything is good until it's not good anymore. And that's really the biggest issue with PMax and consolidating everything. You don't have a lot of options to actually optimize it because you can kind of change the budget, but that doesn't do much. Then you can change the ROAS target up or down. What does that solve?

title_zh: e-com 默认用 target ROAS,不要用 maximize conversion value
summary_zh: Maximize Conversion Value 听起来更聪明:给个预算,Google 自由发挥。但 Google 上的搜索量天天波动,这种模式会强迫算法在 demand 低的日子加价烧完预算(CPC 涨 → ROAS 掉),在 demand 高的日子反而不敢加 budget(CPC 被压低 → 错过红利,revenue 被锁顶)。Target ROAS 是反过来:只认每次 click 的合理价格,demand 高就放量,demand 低就少花,ROAS 稳定。结论:e-com 默认 target ROAS,maximize conversion value 只在三种特殊情况用——老板按预算考核、需要花量、或重置账户。
quote_en: Telling Google to spend the same thing every day, no matter how much demand there is, makes little sense. On days or weeks with low demand, you'll start seeing smart bidding spend your budget by increasing the CPC. Target ROAS doesn't care if there's a thousand people searching or 10,000 people searching in a day.

title_zh: 用 portfolio bid strategy 把多 campaign 合并喂数据
summary_zh: smart bidding 数据越多反应越快、wasted spend 和 opportunity cost 都更低——但前提是数据合并到同一个 bid strategy 学习。Andrew 的做法是用 Portfolio Bid Strategy(过去叫 Bidding Strategy 现在又改名)把 40 个 search campaign 串到同一个策略里,顺便能拉出 projected ROAS / 实际 ROAS / max CPC / min CPC 几个关键报表来诊断。例如近 7 天 actual ROAS 514 但 projected 只到 571,远低于目标 676 → 立刻知道要调 max CPC 或 seasonal bid adjustment,不是干等。
quote_en: We have 40 campaigns all lumped together, which means that we give more data to smart bidding. The key point why more data works better is that smart bidding can then react faster to changes in ROAS, which means less wasted ad spend and less opportunity cost.

title_zh: 降 ROAS 目标 = 让算法去探索,升 ROAS 目标 = 收紧
summary_zh: target ROAS 不是设完就不动,而要在节点上手动调:每次降 ROAS 你是在告诉 smart bidding 去探索新流量、买更多 click;每次升 ROAS 是让它收紧、变高效。即便全年要稳定 ROAS,在大促前/大促刚开始降一档目标,能拿到几天甚至几周的高量低价红利,等算法反应过来调高时已经吃到肉。日常不要频繁动,但 peak / off-peak 转换、conversion 异常、跑量目标变化时一定要主动调。
quote_en: Every single time you lower your ROAS target, you're telling smart bidding to go explore, find more volume, buy me more traffic. Decreasing your target ahead of a peak season or right in the beginning of peak season can help you dramatically increase your volume.

title_zh: brand 词用 manual bid 而非 smart bidding,CPC 能砍到 1/10
summary_zh: smart bidding 的设计目标是用 ROAS 内最大化转化量,不是最低成本拿同一笔转化。所以投 brand 词用 smart bidding 等于主动告诉 Google:再多花点也行。Andrew 给两类账户分别跑 manual bid 测试:无外部分销(没有经销商/marketplace 抢流量)的品牌直接砍到 CPC 降 90%、conversion 不变;有外部分销的(经销商/Amazon 在抢)需要更谨慎,但 manual + 实验仍能省 50%。如果 SKU 太多,branded shopping 可以用 smart bidding,但必须配 max CPC 和很高的 ROAS 目标。
quote_en: After switching to manual bids, the cost per conversion dropped by 10x. Smart bidding maximizes for volume, not for efficiency. Even with a high ROAS target, smart bidding won't minimize spend if it can get more conversions or more exposure at a lower efficiency.

title_zh: 用两个 benchmark 判断 brand 是否过投:>10% spend 或 brand ROAS < 2× 非品牌
summary_zh: 怎么知道 brand 词花多了?Andrew 给两个粗暴 benchmark:(1) brand campaign 占总广告预算 >10% 是大红灯;(2) brand ROAS < 非品牌 ROAS 的 2 倍是另一红灯。比如非品牌 ROAS 500%,brand 应该至少 800-1000%,健康水位通常是 8-10x 起,有的行业能到 20-40x。如果你的 brand ROAS 只比非品牌高一点点,要么 brand 出价太狠,要么非品牌太怂。验证方法是用 Google Ads 的 Experiment 功能:50/50 split,把 max CPC 砍一半看 click 是否稳、cost 是否降,稳的话就保留新值,继续往下压。
quote_en: If you're spending more than 10% of your overall ad budget on your brand, that's a huge red flag. If your branded ROAS is less than two times of your generic ROAS, then it's another red flag. Normally your ROAS in your brand especially in search want to be at least 8 to 10x and probably 20, 30, 40x.

title_zh: brand 不要追求第一名:从 99% 掉到 95% 但 CPC 砍半 = 大胜
summary_zh: owner 心理上很难接受自己品牌词搜出来不是 #1,但实际算账:top impression share 从 99% 降到 95%、CPC 直接砍 50%、conversion 只丢 5-15%——这是大胜利。'坚持 #1 brand 词'是给 Google 交免费税,真正得利的是看着你出价撑高自己词价的竞争对手。在欧洲还可以走 gentleman's agreement,跟竞品/经销商互相不投对方品牌词;美国不流行但仍可试。
quote_en: If you drop from 99% the top impression share to 95% and you save 50% of your CPCs, you might look at it like 'Oh my god, we're not number one.' But if you save 50% of your CPCs and you lose 5%, 10%, 15% of your conversions, that is a win. Over bidding on your name is like giving Google free tax.

title_zh: smart bidding 时代 negative keyword 是按 search-term 自动压价不是死刑
summary_zh: 5 年前 negative keyword 的逻辑是 keyword 级别一刀切,但 smart bidding 已经在 search-term 级别按 device / 价格区间 / 不同 product 单独调价了——同一个搜索词在 desktop 不赚钱可能 mobile 赚,在 $1 CPC 不赚但 $0.25 赚。你提前手动 negate 等于把这个细颗粒度优化的能力锁死。Andrew 的判断:除了明显无关词(竞品名、完全错产品)和 6-12 个月持续表现差的低量词,其余别动,让算法自己降价。新建账户初期或没数据时再加。
quote_en: It already acts like a negative keyword system, but with more data and faster action time and more actions than we will have. A search term might lose money at a $1 cost per click, but it will kill it. It will perform excellently at 25 cents. Smart bidding handles that nuance.

title_zh: 用 click bucket 分箱再加 negative,而不是一刀切 ROAS<200%
summary_zh: Andrew 的标准 negative keyword 工作流:把所有 search term 拉出来按 click 数分箱(0-10 / 10-20 / 20-30 / 30-50 / 50+),自己手算 ROAS(不要用 Google 给的聚合 ROAS,均值的均值会骗你)。0-10 click 的低量段不能动——因为里面同时有未来高 ROAS 和低 ROAS 的种子,只要再多一个 click 转化它就跳到高 ROAS bucket。真正能 negate 的只是 20+ click 还低 ROAS 的部分,实操中能砍掉的浪费 spend 通常是 4-8%——别指望靠 negative 大幅省钱,主要价值是清干净不该出的词。
quote_en: If I take out these three buckets, meaning everything over 20 clicks, then I find 24,000 in spend that I can remove. That's very little. It's like 3 and a half % of the total spend. We find out that roughly between four to 8% is the actual spend we can remove by adding negative keywords.

title_zh: 维护两个 negative 列表:evergreen 和 low-season,大促前清掉 low-season
summary_zh: negative keyword 不要堆在一个列表里。分两份:evergreen(永远不想出现的烂词)和 low-season(本季度不行但旺季可能爆)。比如卖泳衣在二月加 negative 的某些词,到 5-7 月旺季会反过来转化,旺季前要主动从 list 里移除。Andrew 还建议:每年至少一次完全清空 negative keyword 让 smart bidding 重新跑 4 周,因为 SKU/品类/价格/竞争都在变,去年烂词今年可能赚——别让 2018 年的 negative 列表把你账户卡死。
quote_en: Have two negative keyword lists. Evergreen is the horribly performing. Low season is if you're selling swimsuits and then in February some search terms might not work, but in May, June, July they're going to perform exceptionally well. Put them on a low season negative keyword list that you can remove when you get into your peak season.

title_zh: 看 hidden vs visible search term 必须先剔除 brand,否则结论是假的
summary_zh: 有篇 viral 文章说 Google 通过 hidden search term 偷广告主钱:visible 5.6x ROAS,hidden 才 2.59x。Andrew 拆原文数据:差距全来自 brand——brand 词天然不涉及隐私所以 100% 可见、ROAS 也高;hidden 那一坨里非品牌占比远高于 visible,把品牌这块差距摊到 hidden 头上,看起来就像 hidden 在亏钱。一旦把数据切成 'non-brand only',visible 和 hidden ROAS 几乎一致。教训:任何按 visible/hidden、search-partner、device 分组的报表都得先拆 brand 和 non-brand,否则品牌的极端 ROAS 会污染所有结论。
quote_en: When non-brand, this is where it starts being interesting. There's no difference whatsoever. Branded terms are more visible because there's no privacy issues with that. So we're having a bigger portion of the branded search terms that are visible versus non-brand where there's a bigger portion that are hidden.

title_zh: 粒度切太细会饿死 smart bidding,简单结构反而跑得更好
summary_zh: DTC 账户最常见错误是把 campaign 拆得太细——按 category、按 brand vs non-brand、按 phrase vs broad,搞出 18+ 个 campaign。这种粒度等于把数据切碎,smart bidding 没有足够样本就学不会:出价不准、RSA 选不出最优 headline、product-keyword 匹配也乱。Andrew 实操偏好的 baseline 结构:bestseller campaign + main campaign + push campaign(给新品/新品类喂量),最多再加一两个迁就客户的特殊 campaign。复杂度迟早会自己长出来——别一开始就搭复杂结构,'感觉略简单'就停手。
quote_en: Granularity can kill automation. The more you split up the campaigns, the more you split up the data. The more you split up the data, the longer it takes to use the data. Every setup should have a feeling of being this is a little bit too simple. Not overly simple, but just on the verge of I could tweak this. And that's where you stop.

title_zh: 诊断 smart bidding 看 projected ROAS 不看 actual ROAS
summary_zh: Smart bidding 出价不是按 actual ROAS 决策的,是按它自己预测的 projected ROAS。所以你看到 actual 68%(目标 661%) 算法却没降价时,别骂它瞎,因为有 conversion lag 它知道还有转化在路上。判断方法:在 bid strategy 报表里 hover ROAS 列,看 projected ROAS。例如 actual 68 但 projected 677、目标 661,说明算法觉得已经达标甚至超标,继续维持出价是对的。CPC 也不是好指标——smart bidding 会在不赚钱的 segment 上把人踢出 auction、在赚钱的 segment 上保持高 CPC,平均 CPC 看不出任何东西。
quote_en: Projected ROAS is your core KPI to understand what it's doing. The actual ROAS is what the ROAS is with all the traffic that's come in. But if you hover over it, you can see what is it predicting will come in further. CPC is one of the worst things you can look at when you figure out is my bidding changes working or not.

title_zh: 上限突破靠 off-platform:价格、产品页、AOV 比 broad-vs-PMax 重要
summary_zh: PPC specialist 的真正价值不是切 broad/exact,而是看出 off-platform 的瓶颈帮客户提天花板。三个真实案例:(1) 客户改对价格策略,Q1 conversion rate 从 1.32% 涨到 3.34%,profit 直接起飞;(2) 'member price' ROAS 一直差,根因是 product page 没说清如何成为会员、客户不信折扣是真的——改文案就能修;(3) 频繁促销让 AOV 大幅波动,smart bidding 学不会出价节奏,建议直接减促销次数。能跟客户讲清楚这些价值,比讲 'PMax vs standard' 之类账户内话题更值钱。
quote_en: Off-platform optimization more or less drove the entire conversion rate increase. We saw that example before where we just got way higher 3x the conversion rate by working on the prices. It doesn't all have to be broad match. It doesn't all have to be a PMax versus standard shopping conversation. This is what clients are looking for.

title_zh: 拆 campaign 看 conversion 数不看 spend,门槛 300 单/月
summary_zh: 看到一份 case study 说月花 5,000 美金就开始拆 top performing categories 进独立 campaign,Andrew 直接打 1/10 分。拆分的判断标准从来不是 ad spend,是 conversion 数。低于 300 单/月就拆,smart bidding 没有足够数据,每个新 campaign 都会 underperform。一个允许的例外:把表现差但吃量的 SKU 从主 campaign 抽出来扔到次级 campaign 限制其 spend,这才叫 segmentation,不是简单按品类切。Amazon 上同理:Sponsored Display/Brand 单独 campaign 之前先看每个 ASIN 的转化体量。
quote_en: I like doing segmentation, anybody who follow me know that that's one of the core things is to split up. But not until you get over what I call 300 conversions a month, and these guys had 395 conversions in total. This overall segmentation used in this particular case I will give it a 1 out of 10.

title_zh: 用 add-to-cart 当 proxy 转化前必须按比例缩 conversion value
summary_zh: 高 AOV、低转化体量、长决策周期的产品,可以把 add-to-cart 设为 conversion 给算法喂数据。但绝大多数人忽略一个关键步骤:必须按 ATC→购买的比例倒推缩小 ATC 的 conversion value。如果 5 次 ATC 才有 1 次成交,那 ATC 的 value 应设成实际订单价值的 20%(1/5)。不缩 value,直接拿购物车价当转化值,后期切回 purchase conversion 时所有历史 ROAS baseline 全错,smart bidding 学到的出价策略也是垃圾。Amazon 站内拿不到 ATC 信号,但思路通用——任何代理转化都要按转化漏斗比例缩 value。
quote_en: What you want to do is you want to try to calculate what is the relationship from add to cart to purchase. So if it takes five add to carts to result in one conversion or one purchase, then you want to reduce the value of the add to cart conversion by 5x, meaning 20% of what an actual add to cart value is.

title_zh: 判定 case study 真假先验 platform ROAS 与总 revenue 的相关性
summary_zh: 看别人晒的增长 case 时,Andrew 的第一道筛子是查 platform 内 ROAS 与总营收的相关性。一份案例显示 Google Ads ROAS 从 5x 跳到 10x 但同期 blended revenue 没动,另一段 ROAS 翻倍而 blended 反而走平,这种背离说明数字编了或漏掉了其他渠道变化没说。真增长的特征:platform ROAS 和 blended 同方向同幅度变动。Amazon 投放复盘也一样——Sponsored ads 报表里的 sales 涨了,但店铺总销售没涨,要么是 cannibalization 自然单,要么是数据错位,绝不是真正的增量。
quote_en: In order to verify that, you need to make sure that the relationship between Google Ads revenue and the total revenue is there. In this case, we're seeing that the ROAS in Google Ads is one and then it's 18 and here is 40 and here's 50. Then in October, Google Ads ROAS goes down to 5x. Blended is up at 50. There's no correlation.

title_zh: PMax→Standard 切换前必看 channel breakdown 和 100 单门槛
summary_zh: 从 PMax 切回 Standard Shopping 之前先做三个检查:(1) 拉 channel breakdown,看 conversion 来自 shopping 还是 search/YouTube/display——如果 shopping 干了大头,放心切;如果 search 占比高,得单独建 search 或 DSA campaign 接住;(2) 月转化低于 100 单不要切,smart bidding 没数据训练,切完只会更糟;(3) 想切的真实理由必须是'shopping 表现好但 PMax 不愿意 scale 这个 channel',不是凭感觉。Amazon 同理:看 Sponsored Brands vs Display vs SP 的 attribution 占比再决定要不要拆 campaign。
quote_en: If shopping is doing all the heavy lifting, then you're probably fine to switch. You're not probably fine, you're definitely fine to switch. If you're getting fewer than 100 conversions per month inside of PMAX, be careful. If you're under 30, you're basically flying blind trying to make the switch.

title_zh: 切到 standard shopping 前先排除品牌词解锁真实非品牌 ROAS
summary_zh: PMax 里混着品牌词的 ROAS 是假象——总账漂亮的 400% ROAS 拆开看可能 brand 是 900%、非品牌只有 300%。直接照抄 PMax 的 ROAS 目标到 standard shopping 必死。正确做法:先在 PMax 里 exclude brand 跑一段,brand 流量自然落进新建的 brand standard shopping 和 brand search,这时 PMax 的 ROAS 会从 400 掉到 300,这个 300 才是非品牌真实水平,拿它当新 standard shopping 的目标。Amazon 上同理:Sponsored Brand 把品牌词单拎出来,Sponsored Display 看 non-brand 的真实 ROAS。
quote_en: By excluding the brand we now get a clearer idea of what is our PMax actual ROAS. So when we're setting up standard shopping now, we know okay, standard shopping shouldn't be at 400% ROAS target, it should be at 300%. By this part, we actually know exactly how much our non-brand shopping is supposed to be from a ROAS perspective.

title_zh: PMax→Standard 平滑切换:逐步抬 PMax ROAS 把量挤过来
summary_zh: 首选打法是 gradual overlap:新 standard shopping 建好后两个 campaign 平行跑 1-2 周。这时 PMax 因为有数据优势会吃掉 90% 流量,standard shopping 只有 10%,正常。强行换不靠改预算,靠每周抬 PMax 的 ROAS 目标:第一周双方都 500,然后 PMax 涨到 550、600、700,standard shopping 不动,流量自然往 standard 跑。一到 50/50 就立刻 100% 砍掉 PMax,不要因为'看起来还行'多跑——双 campaign 长跑会割裂数据让两个都变差。Amazon 上 SP→SD 切换/auto→manual 切换思路一样:别一刀切,用预算/出价梯度做平滑迁移。
quote_en: Option A is the gradual campaign overlap, and this is my personal go-to. The best way to do this is by increasing the ROAS target on PMax. So in week one we have a 500% ROAS target on both campaigns. Then PMax goes up to 550, then the following week 600, then 700. Once you're at the 50/50 mark, switch over to standard shopping. Do not attempt fate by letting this run for much longer.

title_zh: branded campaign 是品牌防御不是 funnel 阶段,别叫 prospecting
summary_zh: 把账户结构命名为 branded search / prospecting search 听起来对称,但底层逻辑错了。branded 不是 funnel 的某一层(top/mid/bottom),它是品牌防御位——你必须在,因为竞争对手会买你的词。它不参与拉新转化漏斗,也不是 mid/bottom funnel keyword(除非你像 Nike 那样品牌词流量已经成了大众类目搜索)。把 brand 和 prospecting 并列报表会污染你看 non-brand ROAS 的判断。Amazon 上同理:Sponsored Brand 投自己品牌词主要是防御 ASIN 抢位,不该跟 Sponsored Display 拉新混在一起算 ROAS。
quote_en: Saying you have a campaign that's called prospecting and then you have prospecting search indicates to me that you're looking at branded search as something that is a part of your funnel when it's not. It's just you have to be there. You have to defend the position. It's just a brand defense. So that completely misunderstands the funnel.

title_zh: branded shopping 出现非品牌词,根因是 campaign 优先级设错不是缺 script
summary_zh: 很多 in-house 跑脚本往 branded shopping campaign 里塞非品牌 negative,这是治标。真原因要么是 brand campaign 出价太高,要么是 brand campaign 里的 SKU 没同时出现在 non-brand campaign 里——这时 priority 设置失效,brand 反而吃了非品牌流量。Andrew 跑千万级账户从不用脚本,只调 priority 和确保产品在 non-brand 里都有。一个例外:PMax + standard shopping 同时存在时,优先级会被 PMax 打乱,这时也别加 negative,改架构。Amazon SD 投 ASIN-defense 时同理:看 placement 报表别看到 non-brand 流量就乱加 negative ASIN,先查投放结构。
quote_en: When non-branded terms appear in your branded shopping, it's typically because of one or two reasons. Either your bids are way too high in your branded campaigns, or B, the products in your branded campaigns aren't in the non-branded campaigns. We run multi-million dollar campaigns without them. Using the script is just playing whack-a-mole.

title_zh: category-based campaign segmentation 是错的,只有季节品类才拆
summary_zh: 把 shopping 按 category 拆成 tops vs bottoms 这种 arbitrary split 没有任何性能差异——搜的人不分,不同 category 的 conversion rate 也没差。这种拆法只会减少 smart bidding 的数据量。唯一合理的 category 拆分:有明显季节区分的 apparel(冬季 coat vs 夏季 short),且确实季节切换时整组商品停跑。其他场景一律不拆 category。同样,margin-based segmentation 也是错的,因为 click 不等于购买,改用 profit-based bidding(把 conversion value 换成 gross profit)。Amazon 上 SD/SB 按品类拆 campaign 也要克制——除非品类间转化漏斗真的不同。
quote_en: Product category segmentation, particularly effective for what? I have never in my life seen that work. So this in my opinion is a huge mistake. You should avoid any of these arbitrary category splits like a top versus a bottom. There's no performance difference whatsoever between the two. It just reduces the data volume for smart bidding to do.

title_zh: margin-based campaign 失效是因为点击不等于购买
summary_zh: 把 shopping/PMax 按 margin 拆成高/中/低三档 ROAS 目标(300/500/700%) 听起来很对,实际三处全错:(1) 至少 30-50% 消费者最终买的不是他们点的那个 ASIN/category——bidding 是按点击出价的,可购买行为对不上;(2) Google 的 conversion 报表只追溯到点击的 product id 不是真正卖出的 product id,自己看了个假象;(3) 数据被切到三个 campaign,low margin 那条只剩 150 单/月,smart bidding 直接学不会。结论:不要按 margin 拆 campaign。Amazon 上同样:不要按 ACoS target 把同类目 SKU 拆到不同 campaign,会饿死数据。
quote_en: It assumes the consumers buy what they click on, which isn't the case. I've done this analysis in many, many accounts and every single time I review it, at least 30 to 50% of consumers buy a completely different brand or completely different category than the product that they clicked on.

title_zh: 用 gross profit 替代 revenue 做 conversion value 是 margin 问题正解
summary_zh: 想区分高低 margin 产品,正解不是拆 campaign,是把上传给 Google 的 conversion value 从 revenue 换成 gross profit(= revenue - 折扣 - COGS - 运费 - 支付费 - 包装)。每笔订单的真实利润直接喂给 smart bidding,算法自动对高 margin 产品/词/audience 加价、对低 margin 减价,数据完全保留在一个 campaign 里。注意:促销期 conversion value 会突变(100 跌到 70),smart bidding 会迷惑;低 margin 业务(POAS 120% 那种)profit-based 数据噪音太大也不适合。Amazon 站内拿不到 cogs 喂回去,但思路通用:做内部 PoAS 报表辅助决策,别只看 ACoS。
quote_en: What we're trying to do is we're trying to track the gross profit from a sale instead of revenue, which means that you bypass the need to run margin based campaigns. Each transaction tells Google exactly what margin or contribution margin or gross profit that's derived from that transaction.

title_zh: 每次改 bid/budget 必在 graph 上打 note,3 秒省未来几小时复盘
summary_zh: Andrew 15 年最大习惯之一:任何 bidding/budget/暂停/大改都要在 Google Ads graph 里加一条 3 秒的小注释,同时把决策思路存到 Notion 数据库。日后看到某天 spend 断崖、ROAS 异常就能秒查到原因,而不是凭记忆瞎猜。Amazon SP/SB/SD 同理——后台没有 graph annotation,但可以在飞书表格 / Notion 里建 change log,每次改 bid、target ACoS、加 negative、暂停 ASIN 都记一行。复盘和向老板解释波动时这就是救命数据。
quote_en: When you make a bidding change, when you make a budget change, when you make a bigger change to campaigns, new pausing, a lot of stuff, just put in a small note. It takes you 3 seconds to do. And you can then in the future see, hey, we saw lower spend on this day or after this day, what happened?

title_zh: 主动周报 30 分钟换走 80% 临时打断
summary_zh: in-house 投手最大问题是被动响应——老板/品类经理/品牌部随时插队问数据。Andrew 解法:每周固定花 30 分钟(或 10 分钟 Loom)主动发一封周报,覆盖正在跑的 sale、push 的产品、两周前定的事进展、关键指标变化。看似多花 30 分钟,实际把全周零碎打断削掉 80%。Amazon 投手对接老板/电商运营/品牌方时同理:周一固定时间发周报压住所有'你看到 ACoS 涨了吗'的随机骚扰,把自己的 deep work 时段保护下来。
quote_en: Proactive communication lower all other communication tasks by 80%. Just making sure that you every week you send a report or an update out to your manager. Take those 30 minutes and give them an update on everything. It stops people from asking you a thousand questions randomly throughout the week.

title_zh: feed/listing 拆成 hygiene + optimization 两阶段,90% 工作量是首次 buildout
summary_zh: Andrew 10 年管 Google Shopping feed 的核心方法:把 feed 优化拆成两个独立任务。第一阶段 hygiene 是 pass/fail 黑白题——GTIN/brand/availability/condition 是否填对、是否齐全,一次做完几乎不再碰;第二阶段 optimization 才是 title/image/product type/custom label 这些有判断的活。多数人卡死是因为把两件事混在一起做就崩了。Amazon 上 SP/SB 投放对应的是 listing buildout(GTIN/UPC、品牌、属性是否齐全) vs listing optimization(title 关键词、A+、Main Image),先把 hygiene 100% 补齐再投预算优化转化,不要一上来就调 bid。
quote_en: The key isn't to try to optimize everything. It is to split the work into two distinct jobs. One is the feed hygiene and the other one is what I call the true feed optimization. Hygiene is your foundation. It's a pass or fail. Things like your GTIN and availability, brand color, etc. Your only job here is to be 100% accurate.

title_zh: title 关键词宁愿堆多别堆少,过度优化的 CTR 损失远小于不优化的 visibility 损失
summary_zh: Andrew 见过两种 title 错误:overdoing(brand+title+gender+model+color+size+material 全堆,90% 没人搜) 和 not doing at all。结论是——如果只能选一种错就 overdo,因为堆多了 CTR 顶多掉一点,不优化直接丢整盘 visibility。同时要 frontload 最重要的关键词(reseller 把 brand 放最前,DC 自有品牌放最后或不放),不同行业 model number 关键性也不同(电子/配件搜得多,服饰几乎没人搜)。Amazon SP listing title 同理:堆够核心关键词(品牌 + 品类 + 关键属性 + 使用场景),frontload 高搜索量词,SKU 少时直接用 AI 重写一轮 + 人工 QA。
quote_en: I see two types of mistakes when it comes to optimizing product titles. Number one is overdoing it, and the second mistake is not doing it at all. If you need to make a mistake, if you're worried about overdoing it or underdoing it, overdo it. It has a minimal impact on your CTR if you overdo it, and it has a huge impact on your overall visibility if you don't optimize your titles at all.

title_zh: custom label 用来打 bestseller / saboteur / on-sale 标记后再分组出价
summary_zh: Google Shopping 的 custom labels 跟 visibility/排名零关系——加关键词无意义。Andrew 真正用法:打业务标签做分析和分组出价。最常用三个:(1) bestseller:类目顶尖单品,可以单独提 bid;(2) saboteur:不管怎么调 smart bidding 都亏的产品,直接低出价或排除;(3) on-sale:大促/seasonal 期临时标,方便统一调出价。其他可选:price range(高 AOV 单独看)、margin、delivery time、是否新品。Amazon 上对应的是 portfolio + ASIN-level 标签思路:把 SKU 按 bestseller/dog/促销/新品分组,用不同 ACoS 目标和预算,而不是一刀切跑。
quote_en: Custom labels have nothing to do with visibility. My favorite custom labels are bestseller like categorizing if a product is a bestseller or not and also the opposite if it's what we call a saboteur where it's just it's an unprofitable product no matter what we do from a smart bidding perspective. My other favorite is if it's on sale.

title_zh: 促销期 profit-based bidding 会进入 yo-yo 死循环,bid 越调越乱
summary_zh: profit-based bidding(把 conversion value 从 revenue 换成 profit)在 SKU 间 margin 差异大时是神器,但促销期会反噬。原理:revenue 模式下 100 块 AOV 打 8 折降到 80,只跌 20%;profit 模式下 50 利润降到 30,跌 40%。smart bidding 看不懂这种暴跌就开始降 bid,降完一轮 ROAS 数据反而变好又冲回去抬 bid——CPC 一周高一周低,profit 反而更差。Amazon 上没有原生 profit bidding,但促销期手动管 ACoS 目标时同理:大促时不要按平日 ACoS 标准看波动,目标要拍宽松,出价别频繁追涨跌。
quote_en: When you drop your AOV by 20%, you drop your margins by even more. That's a 40% drop in AOV. This means that smart bidding suddenly can't hit its targets. And during a sale, it will start decreasing bids instead of increasing them. The opposite then happens once it's reduced the bids because now ROAS will look too good and it will start increasing the bids again. So we end up with this yo-yo effect.

title_zh: 想看 profit 不一定要切 bid 模式,secondary conversion + 自定义列即可
summary_zh: 想用 profit 数据有三种用途:(1) 不同 margin SKU 出价分层、(2) 让 Google 端 KPI 对齐业务利润 KPI、(3) 找最高 profit 的 ROAS 甜点。只有 (1) 必须切 profit-based bidding,(2)(3) 完全可以保留 revenue 主转化,把 profit 上传成 secondary conversion,然后用自定义列 (all conversion value - cost) 看 net profit / POAS。这样既不破坏 smart bidding 稳定性又拿到 profit 视角。Amazon 同理:别把 ACoS 改成 net ACoS 模型搞自己,做个外部 PoAS 报表辅助看,主出价目标继续按 ACoS。
quote_en: Just because you want to track your profit, it doesn't mean you have to change your entire account to be bidding for profit. If you're just trying to align Google Ads KPIs with business KPIs or just discover what ROAS target drives the highest profit volume, then you can basically just set the profit conversion action to secondary and observe it instead.

title_zh: smart bidding 三个稳定支柱:数据量 + conversion rate 稳定 + AOV 稳定
summary_zh: Andrew 多年研究 smart bidding 何时高效,得出三个支柱:(1) 大数据量;(2) conversion rate 稳定;(3) AOV 稳定。算法靠这三个量预测某个 bid 下能拿到的 ROAS/CPA,任意一个剧烈波动算法就拍不准。所以频繁促销、SKU 价差极大、AOV 突变的账户 smart bidding 都会变糟。Amazon SP/SD 出价算法本质类似:大促前后、新品冷启动期都属于 conversion rate / AOV 不稳定阶段,这时候不要把出价权全交算法,应该手动稳出价、控预算,等数据稳定后再放手。
quote_en: We found it comes back to three things. Number one is lots of data. The second thing is stability in the conversion rate. And the third thing is stability in your AOV. Smart bidding uses all three to predict what your ROAS or CPA can will be with a specific bid. When one of the three factors are off, then smart bidding has a tough time predicting what the optimal bid is.

title_zh: AI Max 会让高 ROAS campaign 偷偷扩到差词,strict 边界控制必须保留
summary_zh: AI Max 是升级版 DSA,会扫 landing page + 现有 keyword + ad copy 自动扩词。问题:一个原本聚焦 Nike running shoe 的高 ROAS campaign,开了 AI Max 后会扩到 CrossFit shoe / 健身包等历史就不转化的词,而你拦不住——smart bidding 会用高 ROAS 数据给低质词加价,污染整个 campaign 结构。Andrew 的解法:开 AI Max 但关掉 final URL expansion,等于只做关键词扩展不做新着陆页扩展。Amazon 上 SP auto/Sponsored Display 自动定向同理:开就要给清晰的 ASIN/category 边界,定期扫 search term 报表把跑偏的词加 negative,不能信全自动。
quote_en: There's no way for me to say that AI Max will not expand the campaign to show for CrossFit shoes or shoes for weightlifting if those keywords can be found in the URLs that are in the campaign. A high ROAS campaign like Nike will then allow AI Max to bid higher for lower performing search terms that we haven't even added to the campaign.

title_zh: 不开 AI 自动写文案,会自动追高 CTR 低转化的'促销标题'
summary_zh: AI Max 的 text asset generation(让算法基于 landing page + 历史广告自动写新 headline)目前控制力不足。可预见的失败模式:某品类一个 SKU 在打 48% off,AI 给整个 ad group 写了 'Save 48%' 的 headline,因为 CTR 高就吃掉所有 impression 预算,但实际转化率很低(其他 SKU 没这折扣)。Andrew 的建议是不开自动文案。Amazon 上对应的是 Sponsored Brand 的 AI generated headline / AI image,以及自动写 A+ 内容——开之前要预审,确认不会因为某个 SKU 折扣而误导整组商品的预期。
quote_en: I can foresee a scenario where AI Max writes an ad where it says save 48% because one product is on sale in a category. And that headline will then take all the spend because the CTR is the highest but conversion rates will be really low. So in general, I don't recommend turning on text asset generation.

title_zh: 用 wartime/peacetime 框架决定要不要冒险买不可追踪流量
summary_zh: smart bidding 看不见的流量也有价值——top-funnel 词、不直接转化但带后续访问的 click 都不会被算法奖励,所以 smart bidding 会主动放弃。决定要不要补这部分流量看账户阶段:wartime(利润紧张、无容错空间)只买能直接看到回报的流量,smart bidding 默认设置就好;peacetime(利润有 buffer、要扩规模)允许浪费一部分预算去买上层漏斗流量。绝大多数账户实测从 smart bidding 切到完全 manual bidding 反而更差,90% 的实验都不划算。Amazon 上同理——不要在 ACoS 紧张的时候开 SD 上层 audience,只在利润 buffer 够时拿来扩增量。
quote_en: I categorize them into wartime and peacetime. Wartime means that our profitability is key and with no margin of error. Solely spending your budget where it's evident we get a return. Peacetime means that we have headroom in our profitability. We are looking to grow and we can handle some waste. In 90% of the accounts that we test with switching over to manual bidding, smart bidding did better.

title_zh: minimum bid 在 portfolio 里强制 smart bidding 买它学不到价值的流量
summary_zh: smart bidding 只在自己看得见 conversion 的地方加价,看不见的它就放弃出价,你会丢一批本来有价值但无法归因的 click。解法:portfolio bid strategy 里设 minimum bid。一个真实账户实验把 min bid 移除当天 click 量直接腰斩(从 3000+ 跌到一千多),CPC 飙升,但 conversion 数几乎不变——证明那批被压掉的 click 算法无法估值。重新加回 min bid 流量回来。可以只对 bestseller / top campaign 用,搭配 negative keyword 把不相关词剔掉。Amazon 端口对应:bid floor / placement modifier 别一味跟 ACoS 跑,某些有真实增量的展位需要硬出价兜底。
quote_en: Minimum bids basically tell smart bidding to always bid at least X amount. We removed the minimum bid limit just to see what would happen. Literally from one day to another, we actually just dropped massively in amount of clicks. Not that much in the amount of conversions. It basically can't tell that we've made this change in the amount of conversions.

title_zh: smart bidding exploration:让算法用 -10/-30% ROAS 发掘冷门词
summary_zh: Google 把 smart bidding exploration 放出 beta 了,允许 smart bidding 在 10-30% 低于目标 ROAS 的预算口袋里去试它平时不会出价的边缘 search query。例子:卖跑鞋的账户算法默认会买 'running shoes',但不会买 'learning to run' 或 'running shoes for beginners' 这类 less obvious 词;开 exploration 后这些词进入测试。比单纯下调 ROAS target 更精准,因为它只在 exploration 流量上让步,不让全账户 ROAS 滑坡。可以叠加 minimum bid 一起用,防止算法过度追效率。Amazon 上对应做法:Sponsored Display contextual + audience auto-targeting,周期性放宽 ACoS 目标让算法找新词/新 ASIN。
quote_en: It's called smart bidding exploration. It allows smart bidding to hit a 10 to 30% lower ROAS while exploring new search terms that you're currently not bidding for. The system knows that if we're selling running shoes, it should be bidding for running shoes. But what about the term 'learning to run' or 'first-time runner' or 'running shoes for beginners'? Combining smart bidding exploration with minimum bids can together be a great way.

title_zh: 广告账户结构错误每天烧掉数千美元
summary_zh: Andy 开篇直接抛出警告：广告账户结构错误是吃利润的隐形杀手，每天可能让你损失数千美元而不自知。投手要先把账户骨架搭对（campaign 目标、adset 切分、CBO/ABO 选择），再谈创意和受众优化。背景是 Shopify dropshipping，但同样适用于 Amazon 投手——campaign 命名混乱、目标错配、预算分配粗放都会放大损耗。原理是 Meta/Amazon 算法都依赖结构来分配学习预算，结构错误会让算法在错的层级上做错的优化。
quote_en: you could be losing thousands of dollars every single day with a simple structural error when running Facebook ads

title_zh: 单兴趣 ABO 测试每个广告组 5 美元
summary_zh: 测试新品时 Andy 用 cold single interest ABO 结构：每个 adset 只放一个兴趣词，预算固定 5 美元/天，10 个兴趣同时跑就是 50 美元/天的测试预算。这套方法的核心是把变量隔离到只有受众一个维度，3-5 天后看哪些 adset 出 ROAS、哪些直接关掉。Amazon 投手的同构做法：一个 SP/SB campaign 只测一个 keyword cluster 或 ASIN target，固定低预算跑 single-variable test，避免多变量混在一起无法归因。
quote_en: we're going cold single interest single interest meaning that we're going to be testing one interest per ad set five dollar ad set daily budget

title_zh: 受众规模甜区 50 万到 7500 万
summary_zh: Andy 测试受众的硬规则：低于 50 万太窄，算法学不出泛化模式，CPM 飙高且很快烧穿；高于 7500 万到 1 亿太宽，算法找不到信号、转化质量差。最佳区间是 50 万-7500 万，留给算法足够样本但又不至于无的放矢。Amazon 投手类比：keyword search volume 和 audience targeting size 也有甜区，太窄的长尾词没量、太宽的大词预算瞬间被 broad match 吃光，要选中等竞争度、有数据基础的词。
quote_en: I don't like to go anything below 500,000 nothing more to 75 to 100 million you want to be in that sweet spot

title_zh: 广告文案钩子用统计数字加幽默
summary_zh: Andy 写广告文案的开头公式：抛一个反直觉的统计数字，紧跟一句轻松调侃，再自然过渡到产品卖点。例子是手机消毒灯——'你知道美国人平均每 12 分钟看一次手机吗？想象一下手机上累积的脏东西。' 数字制造可信度和注意力，幽默降低戒备并把痛点具象化。Amazon 投手用在 SB 视频广告或 listing A+ 文案的开头同样有效：先抛行业数据吸引点击，再用一句生活化语言把痛点放大。
quote_en: did you know Americans on average check their phones every 12 minutes now just imagine all the gunk that gets clustered onto it let's fix that with our new and improved UV phone sanitizer

title_zh: 再营销预算占比控制在 15 到 20
summary_zh: Andy 的 RTG 预算分配：15-20% 给 retargeting，剩下 80-85% 给冷流量 prospecting。逻辑是 RTG 受众池天然有限（最多 30-180 天回看），多投只会重复触达、抬高频次和 CPM，把转化率拉低。Amazon 投手没有传统 retargeting 概念（投放是引流到 Amazon listing，平台不暴露 cart abandoner pool），但同样原理可借鉴到 SD product-targeting 上：competitor ASIN 防御性投放预算占比也不该过高，主预算给 prospecting 类的 keyword/category targeting。
quote_en: I would say at least fifteen to twenty percent you should be dedicating to retargeting

title_zh: 促销折扣上限控制在 10 到 15
summary_zh: Andy 给 RTG 受众的折扣码不超过 10-15%，警告不要发 70% off 这种激进折扣。原因有三：一是 70% off 直接把品牌定价锚点砸碎，下次用户不会全价买；二是利润率被吃光、ROAS 看着好但净利负数；三是会训练算法去找 deal hunter 而非真实买家。Amazon 投手的同构警示：listing coupon 和 promotion 的力度要算回 net margin，长期看 5-15% 比 50% off + free shipping 的 lifetime profit 高得多。
quote_en: you don't want to give like a 70 off discount code maybe i'd say anything from 10 to 15

title_zh: 看利润率不看营收 3000 美元 45 利润胜过 1 万低利润
summary_zh: Andy 反复强调投手该盯利润率而不是 GMV。一个 3000 美元/天 45% 利润率的店，净利 1350 美元；一个 10000 美元/天 8% 利润率的店，净利只有 800 美元，还要承担 3 倍的运营复杂度和退货风险。原理是 paid ads 的 BE-ROAS 决定盈利门槛，提利润率比拉营收更省力。Amazon 投手的直接应用：评估 campaign 不能只看 sales attributed，要算回 ACoS、TACoS 和 net margin，低利润高 GMV 的 SKU 烧广告反而失血。
quote_en: I'd much rather do a 3k day at 45 profit margin than do a 10k day at like an 8 profit margin

title_zh: 免运费门槛要 AB 测试不要拍脑袋
summary_zh: Andy 拒绝凭感觉设免运费门槛，全部 A/B 测：50 美元 vs 75 美元 vs 无门槛跑 6-7 天 50/50 流量分配，比 AOV 和 conversion rate 综合得出最优解。原理是免运费门槛是 AOV 杠杆，门槛过低吃运费成本，过高拖垮转化。Amazon 投手类比：listing 的 bundle 组合、coupon 阈值、Subscribe & Save 折扣比例都该用 split test 验证，而不是抄竞品或拍脑袋定。
quote_en: instead of just guessing what works best i'd actually a b test this and see what shipping minimum gets you the highest average order value while still maintaining a high conversion rate

title_zh: 购后追加销售在确认页加单不影响转化
summary_zh: Andy 的 AOV 提升大招是 post-purchase upsell：用户付完款进确认页，再弹一个 one-click upsell（不重新过支付），愿意加的就加，不影响主转化。逻辑是已经付款的用户信任度最高、阻力最低，加单率经常 15-25%，纯增量利润。Amazon 投手没有这个产品形态，但同构思路可用在 listing 的 'Frequently bought together' 和 Brand Story 模块——把高毛利配件放到购买决策完成后的视觉位置，吃增量 AOV。
quote_en: post-purchase upsells are upsells that come after the customer has already purchased the main item meaning that they don't disrupt the conversion rate at all

title_zh: AB 测试用 50 50 流量分配跑足 6 到 7 天
summary_zh: Andy 用 Ship Scout 这类 split test app 做 AOV 测试的标准流程：50/50 流量切分、最少 6-7 天观察窗口（覆盖工作日和周末两个完整周期），样本量够才下结论。短于 6 天的测试会被周末/工作日转化率差异污染，大概率得出错误结论。Amazon 投手的对应工具：Manage Your Experiments（A+ 内容、main image、title 测试），同样要跑满官方推荐的 8-10 周或至少有统计显著样本，禁止 3 天就改结论。
quote_en: i highly recommend doing a 50 50 split test for at least six to seven days that way you cover both weekdays and weekends

title_zh: 区分人群温度: warm audience 永远比 cold 高效
summary_zh: Ben Heath 强调: 投给已访问网站/订阅邮箱/参与过内容的 warm audience, 转化效率永远高于 cold audience。预算分配应优先 custom audience (网站访客 > 邮箱列表 > 互动用户 > 视频观看者 > 主页粉丝), 预算还有剩才扩到 cold。原理: warm 用户已对品牌有认知, 无需重复教育, 转化路径更短。
quote_en: Advertising to people that have visited your website, engaged with your content, joined your email list, or bought from you before, will always be much more effective than advertising to cold audiences.

title_zh: warm audience 必须按行为分层 segmentation 投不同 ad
summary_zh: 多数广告主对 warm audience 用同一条广告偷懒, 这浪费了分层潜力。正确做法: 按访问页面/兴趣类目把网站访客拆成多个 custom audience, 每个细分受众配独立创意, 推他们已经表现过兴趣的具体产品。原理: 不同行为信号代表不同购买意图阶段, 一刀切等于浪费数据。Amazon 类比: ASIN 维度区分浏览过/加车/已购可借鉴。
quote_en: Most businesses offer multiple products and services. But when it comes to advertising to their warm audiences on Facebook, they get lazy. They use the same ad for everyone, which just promotes one product or service.

title_zh: 直接卖服务给陌生人无效, 先用广告建 brand following
summary_zh: Heath 自述早期失败: 直接给陌生人投服务广告, 甚至送免费咨询都难成单。后切换为先投预算建品牌内容/粉丝沉淀, 再卖货, 业绩翻倍。原理: 没有内容/品牌信任的陌生人对硬广天然抗拒, 而粉丝群体对促销有 "排队购买" 效应。Amazon 启示: 单条 listing 想直接靠 SP cold 流量爆单很难, 配合 SB Brand Store / Posts 建品牌资产后转化更稳。
quote_en: I tried directly advertising my services to complete strangers which did not work I even gave away free consulting sessions in the hope that people would then use my services which barely worked.

title_zh: 内容定位: 服务类教育, 实物类娱乐
summary_zh: 创建 epic content 第一步是决定教育还是娱乐。服务型业务用教育内容(把行业 know-how 公开), 因为受众想学; 实物型品牌用娱乐内容(参考 Dollar Beard Club 的搞笑视频), 因为受众没有学习需求, 但会被有趣的内容拉进。原理: 内容形式必须匹配品类的购买决策心理, 选错只会做无效内容。
quote_en: for most service based businesses I think it makes more sense to educate because as a service provider you know things that your target market would like to know... for most product based businesses on the other hand it makes more sense to entertain.

title_zh: Exclusion Marketing: 已转化人群必须排除避免烧无效预算
summary_zh: Heath 用 "exclusion marketing" 把 cost per lead 从 £1.59 降到 £0.70 (-56%)。原理: Facebook 算法会持续把广告推给已点过的人, 但其中很多已转化, 继续投是浪费。做法: 装 pixel 跟踪转化, 在受众里把已购/已留资人群 exclude 掉。Amazon 类比: SD 受众投放时排除已购买 ASIN 的人群, 避免广告费打在 repeat 自然流量上。
quote_en: a lot of the people that have clicked on your Facebook ad will have converted into a lead or sell and continuing to advertise to those people is a waste of money you need to distinguish between those people that have clicked and converted

title_zh: campaign objective 决定算法优化方向, 选错从源头偏
summary_zh: 选 campaign type 等于选 objective, Facebook 会按这个目标去优化投递。比如 traffic campaign Facebook 就只优化点击, 不会管转化质量; 选 PPE (post engagement) 就只优化互动。原理: 算法的优化目标是黑盒里的 "最低成本动作", 你选什么它就给你什么, 选错 objective 等于让算法去做不直接产生收入的动作。Amazon 类比: SD 选 reach vs page visits vs purchases, 出价基准完全不同。
quote_en: by selecting a campaign type you are selecting an objective for your campaign this is very important because Facebook will optimize your campaign for that objective for example if you create a traffic campaign then Facebook will try to generate as much traffic as possible

title_zh: 暴力加预算扩量会烧穿目标人群, 必须切到新池子
summary_zh: Heath 警告: profitable campaign 想扩量, 直接加预算只能撑一段时间, 之后绝大多数目标人群已经看过广告, ROI 会快速崩盘。解法是创建 lookalike audience 切到新人群池继续扩。Amazon 启示: 单一 SP 关键词或 SD ASIN target 的人群有限, 长期加预算 ACOS 必涨, 真正的扩量是横向开新关键词组/新 ASIN target/新人群分组, 而不是堆 budget。
quote_en: what happens when you've burnt out your target audience at some point the majority of your target audience would have seen what you're advertising if you keep advertising to the same group of people then your profitable Facebook ad campaign will very quickly become not so profitable

title_zh: Lookalike 起步用 1% size, 越大越不准
summary_zh: 创建 LAL 时 Heath 默认推荐 1% size, 包含国家内最像 source 的 1% 人群; 选 5%/10% 受众更大但相似度衰减明显, 起步过大等于把 cold 池子混进来。原理: 受众扩大与质量是反比, 小池子起步验证转化效果再视情况扩。Amazon 启示虽弱(无 LAL), 但 "先小池子验证再扩量" 思路普适, 比如 SD audience 先用 narrow ASIN target 测出来再放宽。
quote_en: I would recommend creating a 1% look-alike audience as this will contain the 1% of Facebook users in the country you're targeting that are most similar to your source audience the larger the percentage you choose here the larger and less accurate your local our audience will be

title_zh: 广告文案只面向一个理想客户写, 想取悦所有人=取悦不了任何人
summary_zh: Heath 的 7 条文案技巧首条: 写广告文案时脑子里只装一个具体的理想客户, 像和这一个人对话。原理: 试图覆盖所有人的文案会变得空泛无差异, 没有人会觉得 "在说我"。Amazon 启示: 写 SP/SB 标题和 listing bullet 也要锁定核心买家画像 (use case + 痛点), 不要堆所有卖点。
quote_en: if your ad is trying to appeal to everyone then it'll end up appealing to no one it's best to write your ad copy with a single individual in mind imagine that you're talking to your absolute ideal customer.

title_zh: 一条广告只放一个 CTA, 多 CTA 等于稀释转化
summary_zh: Heath: 很多广告主同时让用户 "看博客 + 关注 Twitter + 买产品", 这是最常见的低效写法。如果真正想要的是销售/留资, 文案就只放购买/咨询这一个 CTA。原理: 多动作选项造成决策疲劳, 用户会两边都不点。Amazon 启示: SD 创意里别又喊 "Learn more" 又喊 "Add to cart", 选定一个动作把整条文案对齐。
quote_en: I've seen a lot of ads that are asking people to do two or three things when really the advertiser probably wants people to take one very specific action don't tell people to check out your blog or follow you on twitter if what you really want is leads and sales.

title_zh: scarcity 紧迫感措辞对 Facebook 广告效果立竿见影
summary_zh: Heath 多次实测稀缺性词汇 (hurry, today only, for a limited time, now) 对广告表现有显著拉动, 即使他自己每次都被惊讶到。原理: 稀缺性触发损失厌恶心理, 用户怕错过会立刻行动。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 文案/A+ 配合 Lightning Deal/Coupon 时可以加 "Limited Time Only", 也契合 Amazon 自己的 "Only X left" 紧迫机制。
quote_en: tip number 7 is to use scarcity any words that instill a sense of urgency will get your target market to respond including things like hurry now today only for a limited time makes a massive difference I'm always surprised at how much of an effects scarcity has

title_zh: Average Customer Value 决定你能出多高的广告价
summary_zh: Heath 强调跑广告的人必须盯 Average Customer Value: 同行 LTV £100, 你做到 £200 就能在 FB/Google 上出价压死对手抢量, 因为客户值更多钱。原理: 平台是出价竞价市场, 真正的护城河是单客价值而不是创意技巧。Amazon 启示: 提升 ACOS 容忍度的根本是提高客单价/复购 (bundle, Subscribe & Save), 不是无脑压 bid。
quote_en: if your average customer value in the same industry if you can increase that to two hundred pounds if you can have twice the average customer value that they have that means that you can go into the online advertising spaces you can go into Facebook and Google and you can afford to outbid them

title_zh: Upsell 时机最佳是结账前 Thank You 页之前, 不是事后邮件
summary_zh: Heath: 提升 ACV 最有效的不是涨价 (会丢客), 而是 upsell, 而且必须在用户刚下完单还没看到 Thank You 页时弹出第二/第三 offer, 此时下单冲动最强。事后邮件/再营销远不如即时 upsell。原理: 购买行为本身降低后续小额加单阻力。Amazon 启示: Frequently Bought Together / Subscribe & Save / Brand Store cross-sell 的位置选择就是这个逻辑, 把推荐放在加车后/购物车页价值最高。
quote_en: the absolute best way to do it is to catch them immediately after they've bought that initial product so before they hit the Thank You page they buy on the sales page before they you know they go through the checkout process before they hit the Thank You page right in there you want to hit them with your upsell

title_zh: 教育型视频广告最佳时长 2-4 分钟, 别为了短而砍内容
summary_zh: Heath 实测教育内容视频广告最佳长度 2-4 分钟: 留 10-15 秒 intro + 30 秒 CTA + 中间纯干货, 短于 2 分钟价值不够, 长于 4 分钟用户看见时长就放弃。产品演示按需缩短, 娱乐内容只要够好玩可以到 10-12 分钟。原理: 不是越短越好, 关键是 "刚好讲清楚"。Amazon 启示: SBV/Posts 视频卡死 15-30 秒是错的, 复杂品 (家电/工具) 2-3 分钟解构产品反而效果更好。
quote_en: the best length of educational video content on Facebook is around about 2 to 4 minutes long... I wouldn't go much shorter than 2 minutes either because remember you're going to have your intro which may take 10 15 seconds and then you're probably going to have some sort of call to action at the end

title_zh: 电商优先用 Carousel 多图广告, 单图正在被淘汰
summary_zh: Heath 实测 carousel ads 在电商场景几乎一直跑赢 single image: 一条广告同时展示多 SKU, 每张图独立 headline + CTA + 落地页, 算法还会自动把表现最好的图排首位; 方形图占垂直空间更大更吸睛; 多张图轮换天然抗 ad fatigue。原理: 多 SKU 覆盖了 target audience 内不同偏好的子人群。Amazon 启示: SB 多产品广告/SD 多 ASIN 创意比单一 ASIN 抗疲劳, 应优先选择多产品布局。
quote_en: carousel ads nearly always outperform single image ad... using multiple images that advertise a number of different products really helps with ad fatigue so if you were just advertising one product to the same audience over again they're going to become bored and fatigued with that ad very quickly

title_zh: Lead Ads 量大但质量差, 必须强制收手机号才救得回
summary_zh: Lead Ads 在 FB 内自动填表, 留资成本远低于跳转网站, 但 Heath 经验是质量明显劣化, 邮件根本不回。补救: 表单必须强制要求 phone number, 留资后 1-2 小时内电话跟进, 越晚越难转化。原理: 摩擦低 = 用户投入感低 = 后续响应率低, 必须在留资后立刻补摩擦。Amazon 启示弱 (无 lead form), 但通用结论是 "低门槛流量来源必须配高强度后续承接"。
quote_en: the leads that are generated through facebook lead ads and consistently worse quality than the leads that are generated from an equivalent campaign where people are sent to someone's website... because it is so easy for them to submit their contact information they're not as invested in the process

title_zh: 想要订单就选 Conversions, 不要继续用 Boost Post
summary_zh: Heath agency 80-90% 客户跑的都是 Conversions campaign, 接手新账户最常见的快速优化就是把客户原来的 traffic / engagement / boost post 改成 conversions。原理: Boost Post 默认是 PPE 目标, 算法只优化 like/comment, 不会优化购买。Amazon 启示: SD 选 "page visits" vs "purchases" objective, 选错后者算法压根不学转化信号; 始终用最贴近收入的 objective。
quote_en: I would say that 80 percent maybe even 90 percent of all the campaigns that we run for our clients are conversion campaigns and that's a way that we can often get a quick and easy win for our clients when we do take over their account is by converting their campaign objectives from traffic or engagement to conversions

title_zh: 总预算 10% 留给品牌曝光, 长期复利
summary_zh: Heath 建议在所有跑 conversions 的广告主, 总预算至少留 10% 跑 Brand Awareness campaign, 算法会优化 "能记住你品牌的人"。原理: 直效广告榨当下转化, 但品牌资产带来长期低成本流量, 全押直效会陷入越投越贵。Amazon 启示: SP/SD 转化导向之外要给 SB / Brand Store / Posts 留预算, 复购和品牌词搜索量是长期 ACOS 改善的关键。
quote_en: I would recommend that businesses advertising on Facebook dedicated at least 10% of their total ad budget to brand awareness campaigns because the effects over the long run can be very beneficial

title_zh: 推内容广告必须带 CTA, "裸内容" 浪费 hyper-responsive 流量
summary_zh: Heath: 大家都说推内容暖人群, 但只推光秃秃的内容 (naked content) 就漏掉一群叫 hyper-responsive 的小众人群——他们第一次看到就准备买。所以视频结尾必须有 CTA, 博客中间穿插自己产品广告。原理: 用 awareness 的内容也能直接接转化, 不需要等下一步。Amazon 启示: SBV 视频不能只展示功能, 末帧/口播必须 "Shop Now on Amazon", 即使主目标是建认知。
quote_en: there are a very small percentage of your target market called the hyper responsive that don't need to be warmed up they'll be ready to buy right now and that's why you want to include a call to action in your content you want to give those hype responses a chance to buy your products or services the first time they see your piece of content

title_zh: 提高 lead 质量靠加摩擦: 用日历预约替代普通表单
summary_zh: Heath: 投诉 "FB lead 质量差" 的根因不在 Facebook 而在落地页。把简单的联系表单换成日历预约 (Acuity 等), 让用户在你日程上自己选时段, 量会少但质量飙升, 因为肯花精力预约的都是真意向。原理: 适度摩擦过滤了 "随手填" 的伪 lead。Amazon 启示弱 (无 lead form), 但通用思路: 衡量流量质量时摩擦点的设计比量大重要。
quote_en: where possible I like to get my prospects to book a free phone call directly into my calendar... because this process is a lot more involved you are going to generate less leads... but the ones that are involved in the process that are really interested in your product or services they are going to do that so you're going to retain the higher quality leads

title_zh: Slideshow 单图秒数: 3-4 秒最佳, 太短看不清太长划走
summary_zh: Heath 实测 slideshow 广告每张图停留时长 3-4 秒最佳, 短了看不清产品, 长了用户不耐烦下滑。同时建议把 10 张图配额用满, 加 FB 自带 BGM 提升完播。原理: 视觉广告的节奏直接影响完播率与点击, 不是越快越好也不是越慢越细。Amazon 启示: SBV 视频如果是 slideshow 风格, 镜头切换 3-4 秒一组体感最舒服, 不要每张图压到 1 秒。
quote_en: from the testing we've done we found about three to four seconds is usually about right

title_zh: Cold audience frequency 上 2-2.5 就开始疲劳, 必须换素材
summary_zh: Heath 经验值: 对 cold 受众, frequency 升到 2-2.5 时 conversion cost 通常开始恶化, 此时该换创意/换受众/换 offer。Warm audience 池子小, frequency 9-15 都还能跑, 不必紧张。原理: 没听过你的人看 2 次广告就分流成转化或冷漠, 老用户重复曝光天然容忍。Amazon 启示: SP 高频曝光关键词若 CTR 跌、ACOS 涨, 优先想 "是否 frequency 太高" 而非压 bid。
quote_en: any an ad frequency of anything above about a two maybe a two and a half is when we usually start to see results drop off particularly to cold audiences... if you're advertising to warm audiences... with those you can go much much higher there's not really a number at which you might need to make adjustments you just have to gauge it

title_zh: frequency 高效解法三选一: 换素材 / 换人群 / 换 offer
summary_zh: frequency 偏高时三种修法: ① 换创意 (新视频/新主图/新标题) ② 换 targeting 把同一 offer 给到新人群 ③ 换 offer 给到同一人群。原理: 疲劳源是 "创意-受众-offer" 这个三元组的某一环重复, 任意切换一个就能继续榨剩下两环的价值。Amazon 启示: SD ASIN target 跑疲了, 别只换 bid; 要么换主图副本要么换 ASIN 范围要么换 promo 角度。
