quote_en: one often simple way if you think that the offers really good and the targeting is really good is to change your ad creative... another option is obviously to change the targeting... perhaps you could offer them something else you could advertise a different service that you offer a different product

title_zh: Reach objective 适合限时促销和小本地受众, 普通转化别选
summary_zh: Reach objective 告诉算法 "覆盖最多人, 别重复", 默认 conversion-only objective 反而会反复推给同一批 "高潜" 用户。适合两个场景: ① 限时促销 (Easter/Christmas/flash sale) 必须在窗口期触达全部目标; ② 本地小受众 (5-10mi 内人口稀少) 受众池子本身小。原理: Reach 牺牲转化效率换覆盖广度, 用错了浪费预算。Amazon 启示: Prime Day/Black Friday 短窗口内 SD reach 类目标可短期开, 平时禁用。
quote_en: I think this is particularly useful if you're running a timely promotion so let's say for example you're running like a flash sale or something to do with like a holiday... where there's a time limit on it well you want to make sure that as many people within your target audience see your ad for whatever it is you're offering within that time window

title_zh: App install 类广告千万别先跳官网, 直接到商店
summary_zh: Heath 看过有客户把 app install 流量先送到自己网站再让用户去商店下载, 中间多一步丢一大半人。正确做法: 选 App Installs objective + 直接跳 App Store/Google Play, 减少所有中间步骤。原理: 转化路径每多一步流失率几何级上升 ("摩擦守恒定律")。Amazon 启示: SD 落地页直接打 PDP, 不要先到 Brand Store 索引页; 每多一跳 conversion 都掉。
quote_en: you don't want to do that with the app installs and add objective uses a sent directly from Facebook to the location where they can download the app... it's sort of a rule in digital marketing that you want to make things as easy as possible for people because if you do more people are going to do it if you have that extra step in there of taking people to your website first you're going to see drop-off rates

title_zh: 广告视频几乎一致优于图片, 哪怕是产品类
summary_zh: Heath: 在 Facebook 跨多 vertical 测试 video 几乎一直跑赢 image 广告, 因为 newsfeed 里 motion 自动抓眼, 静音也能传 message。Amazon 启示: SBV (Sponsored Brand Video) 在 search 结果页占据更大视觉空间且自动播放, 优先级应高于 SP/SB 静态广告; 即使没有 polished 视频, 简单产品 demo 也比静态主图好。
quote_en: video ads are better than image ads now this is basically true across Facebook as a platform videos are much more engaging... when videos show up in people's newsfeeds and either on their desktop or their mobile it's gonna grab them attention a lot more there's gonna be even though it starts on silent there's movement that's gonna grab

title_zh: lead magnet 的本质是 "加速达成" 而不是 "教学全集"
summary_zh: Heath 总结表现最好的 lead magnet 是帮目标客户 "更快达成他们本来就想达成的目标", 比如他自己做的 "五段式 FB 广告模板" 直接给现成结构, 比写一本电子书价值高。原理: 完整教学耗用户精力, 模板/清单类 "省时间" 资产命中目标用户的核心动机。Amazon 启示弱 (无 lead magnet), 但通用结论: A+ 内容/视频应该让买家更快做出购买决策, 而不是炫耀全部 feature。
quote_en: the best lead magnet help your target market achieve something they want to achieve but it helps them achieve it faster so if you take the example of the Facebook ad template... what it does is it helps them create Facebook ads that are highly effective faster than if they were trying to do it themselves

title_zh: 起步预算 $5-10/day 验证转化, 不要被预算定义压力绑架
summary_zh: Heath 给新手的预算建议: 不要纠结大数字, 起步 $5-10/day, 验证 conversion campaign 能跑通后再 scale。早期最大风险不是 "预算太小", 而是 "预算太大但学习信号不准"。Amazon 启示: 新 SP campaign 起步 $10-20/day 测 7-14 天, 看到稳定 ACOS 信号再阶梯加预算; 不要一上来就 $100/day 烧。
quote_en: what I usually say to people is start off small establish your something works and then look to scale up and if you want to start with you know something like five dollars a day ten dollars a day that could be a decent starting point

title_zh: 服务类广告必须出真人脸, 匿名公司号转化差
summary_zh: Heath 服务业 lead 漏斗的关键经验: 视频必须 face-to-camera 出真人, 因为服务交付方就是这个人, 客户在决定付钱前必须先认这张脸。匿名 logo 视频转化明显劣于真人。原理: 服务业本质是信任买卖, 真人脸是最低成本的信任信号。Amazon 启示: 中小品牌 SBV 视频里出现创始人/产品讲解员能显著提高品牌忠诚度, 比纯 B-roll 更有效。
quote_en: you can see that my face you know I'm face to camera this is a face to camera video and that's really important I think for service providers because the vast majority of service businesses... you or someone within your company is going to be interacting directly with your clients with your customers so they want to know that there's a real person

title_zh: Cold 视频广告卡死 2-4 分钟, 长了没人看到 CTA
summary_zh: Heath: 给 cold audience 投视频, 必须 2-4 分钟内结束, 因为视频结尾才是 CTA, 长视频用户根本到不了 CTA。原理: cold 用户耐心阈值很低, 信息密度优先于内容完整度。Amazon 启示: SBV/Posts 视频如果带 CTA, 节奏要前置, 关键 hook + CTA 不要拖到 30 秒后, 否则 CTA 永远展示不到。
quote_en: you can see that it's only three minutes and 14 seconds long and that's really important as a digital marketer I'd love attention spans online to be much much larger than they are but they're not too cold audiences to people who don't know who I am and I'm going to create a short video I think two to four minutes for this style of video is really important

title_zh: 想赚钱只用 conversions 和 catalog sales 两个目标
summary_zh: Dara 在 Tinuiti 跑过大量 DTC 账户,90%+ 的预算只用 conversions 和 catalog sales 两种 campaign objective,其他都是浪费钱的虚荣指标。Traffic / engagement / video views / page likes 这些上层目标只能买来点击和点赞,Facebook 的算法不会给你筛购买意图人群。新手最常见的错误就是被便宜的 CPC 骗去开 traffic 活动。Amazon 端类比:Sponsored Display 的 reach campaign 不是赚钱目标,Sponsored Brand / SD with optimize for conversions 才是。
quote_en: if you are using Facebook Ads to make money you are gonna be either using a conversions or a catalog sales objective... frankly traffic campaigns or garbage most of the time and even my facebook rep has said never to use them

title_zh: Conversion + lead optimization 比 lead generation 转化更好
summary_zh: Dara 最近的 A/B 测试发现:做 lead 收集时,与其用 lead generation 目标(站内表单),不如用 conversion campaign 但 optimize for lead。原因是 lead gen 表单填得太轻,带来的是 CPL 低但购买意愿弱的虚假线索;conversion 目标会让算法去找愿意离开 FB / 进网站的人,远端转化更好。原理:选择越上游的优化事件,带来的人质量越差。Amazon 没有 lead form,但同理 — Sponsored Display 选 ROAS optimization 比 reach optimization 远端 ASIN 转化更好。
quote_en: the conversion campaign with a lead optimization is tending to do a lot better and drive more sales further down the line while lead generation campaigns tend to get like a better CPL or cost per lead but they don't tend to convert as well

title_zh: Catalog sales 用 DPA 把用户看过的商品推回给他
summary_zh: Catalog sales 把整个 Shopify 商品库接入广告,根据用户访问 / 加购的具体 SKU 动态展示该商品(DPA, Dynamic Product Ads)。这是 FB 最强的 retargeting 武器之一,因为人看过同一个产品再被推时购买率显著拉高。Amazon 端:DPA 概念在 Amazon 完全不存在(没有 retargeting),但 Sponsored Display product targeting 可以投在竞品 ASIN 详情页 — 是 Amazon 唯一一个'商品级精准展示'近似物,逻辑上从此处迁移过来。
quote_en: this kind of campaign actually shows your the products that you have in your store directly in the ad and what's really cool is you can retarget people based on the products that they're interested in so if they went to a product page or even added it to cart you can retarget those people

title_zh: FB 公式:产品价 × 50 单/周 × 4 周 = 起步月预算
summary_zh: FB 官方推的预算公式:算法需要每周 50+ 个 pixel purchase 才能跳出 learning phase,所以月预算 = 产品价 × 50 × 4。$100 产品 → $20K/月起步,门槛极高。Dara 自己跑代理时的实操是:< $200 产品月预算 $2K 起步($66/天),> $200 产品 $5K-$10K 起步($150/天),低于这个量算法学不出东西。Amazon 类比:SD / SB 的算法也需要足够 conversion 数据才能优化稳,新建活动每天预算太低($10-$20)会让 Amazon 找不到出价节奏,建议至少 $50/天起跑 7-14 天。
quote_en: facebook actually works the best if you have about 50 purchases through the pixel every single week... so you have a hundred dollar product and you want to make 50 purchases for that during the first week so you'll take a hundred times fifty and that's five thousand dollars

title_zh: 新站 pixel 数据不足时降级 optimize for add-to-cart
summary_zh: 刚开站 / pixel 还没攒够 purchase 数据时,直接 optimize for purchase 算法找不到信号,会跑得很糟。Dara 的做法是先降一档 — optimize for add-to-cart,先把流量倒进站内累积 pixel 数据,等 purchase 累计到 50+/周再切回 purchase optimization。原理:算法学的是 conversion event 的人群信号,事件太稀疏就学不出。Amazon 类比:新 listing 直接打 ROAS 目标会跑不动,先用 SP automatic 跑出关键词 + 评价基础,再切手动 + 高价值 keyword 优化。
quote_en: if your website is brand new and you're a brand new business you don't have much data being tracked through your pixel... so in that case you know we'd be optimizing for add to cart but that means we need to start driving traffic

title_zh: 高客单产品必须配独立 retargeting funnel,80% 第一次不下单
summary_zh: Dara 引用 DTC 行业数据:80%+ 的人在第一次看到广告时不会买,需要在 Google / FB / 邮件多次触达才会下单。所以高价产品($300+)必须把月预算拆成两块 — prospecting(冷流量)+ retargeting(回访人群),只投 prospecting 等于把 80% 的潜在订单送给竞争对手。Amazon 没有 retargeting,但等价机制是 BSR + 自然流量承接 + 评论积累 — 高客单 listing 必须把 SD/SB 引来的流量配合 listing A+ 内容、Brand Store、问答区的'回访说服'素材一起做,否则一锤子流量只能转化最冲动的那批。
quote_en: more than 80 percent of people do not purchase a product on the first touch point which is often an ad which means that you know they're going to have to do some research about your product and they're going to have to be retargeted

title_zh: 每天刷 Facebook Ad Library 抄竞品 mobile-first 素材
summary_zh: Dara 作为 paid social director 每天的固定动作是去 facebook.com/ads/library 搜竞品和品类龙头(Lululemon、Billy)看他们在投什么广告,看到好的 mobile-first 视频就录屏发给客户做模板。重点学的是:竖版 / 短 / 前 3 秒动作 / logo 前置 / call-out 标签。Amazon 没有公开的 ad library,但等价做法 — 每天去同品类 Top 10 BSR 的产品详情页看他们的 SB video、A+ 主图视频、SD product targeting 投放素材;以及 TikTok / Instagram 上的同品类 UGC,直接借鉴 hook 结构。
quote_en: I do this almost every day just because I want to see not only what my brands competitors are doing but also like what big brands are doing and if they're doing something interesting I might try and replicate it and some of my own ads

title_zh: iPhone 拍 UGC 比专业制作转化更高,品牌不必怕便宜感
summary_zh: Dara 反复强调:很多客户一听到要做视频广告就以为要花大钱请团队,但她真正在用的高转化素材都是 iPhone 拍的 UGC + 简单字幕图形。例子是 Billy(剃刀品牌)整套素材都像用户自拍。原理:Meta 算法 + 用户心理在'广告原生感'下 stop rate 反而更高,精修感太强的广告 thumbnail-stop rate 反而下降。Amazon 端 100% 适用 — SD video / SB video / lifestyle 主图都是,UGC 风格的产品使用场景视频比棚拍展示视频 stop-scroll 更强、CTR 更高。
quote_en: they always get this like glazed over look in their eye which is like oh my god now I'm gonna have to spend tons of money not only on advertising but on also on creative for the advertising and it's like no it doesn't have to be that way you can create really great videos with an iPhone

title_zh: 看竞品广告时区分 prospecting vs retargeting 素材
summary_zh: Dara 的高级技巧是看 Ad Library 时不仅看 creative,还要推断这条广告是投给冷流量(prospecting,讲卖点 + 钩子)还是老客 / 访问过的人(retargeting,讲折扣 + 紧迫 + 社交证明 + 客户证言)。两种素材的 hook 结构完全不同。Amazon 没有 retargeting,但 SD audience(views remarketing)的素材应该往'你之前看过这个'方向写,而 SD product targeting(投在竞品页)的素材要直接对比卖点 + 价格优势。
quote_en: something I also really like doing is trying to figure out which ads are for retargeting only and which ads are for prospecting only

title_zh: Testing 阶段必须用 ad set budget,不要用 CBO
summary_zh: Dara 的核心规则:测新人群 / 新素材时永远用 ad-set-level budget,不用 CBO(campaign budget optimization)。原因 — CBO 会自动把预算压到表现最好的那一两个 ad set 上,剩下的 ad set 拿不到足够花费,数据不够你根本不知道它们其实是什么水平,等于浪费测试机会。CBO 只在已经验证过的 winner 人群放大期用。Amazon 类比:测新关键词组 / 新 ASIN targeting 时,用 manual bidding + 独立 campaign 拆开,不要全塞进一个 dynamic bid down only 的大 campaign,否则强词把弱词压死,看不到弱词真实潜力。
quote_en: I want to make sure that each ad set is getting the right amount of spend so that I can properly evaluate it if your ad set doesn't get enough spend you don't actually know how it's performing... I'm able to not only control it better but I get better results just by simply using ad set budgeting for testing

title_zh: 已验证 winner 才放进 CBO 单 campaign 放量
summary_zh: Dara 的 scaling 流程:ad-set-budget testing campaign 跑出 winner ad set 后,把这些 winner 单独搬进一个新的 CBO campaign 放量。理由:(1) winner 集中放在 CBO 里,算法会自动把预算往表现最好的那个倾斜,scale 阶段更高效;(2) campaign 级控制预算比 ad set 级更稳,改 daily budget 一次到位;(3) CBO 还能避免重叠人群被反复触达过载。Amazon 类比:SP automatic 跑出高转化 search term 后,搬到 SP manual exact + 独立 campaign,设单独高预算 + 提价,这是 Amazon 端的'CBO scaling'近似流程。
quote_en: I always use a CBO campaign for my best performing top of funnel audiences that have been previously tested and have gotten good results... ultimately this is also the best way for me to scale up if I want to start increasing budgets because it's a lot easier for me to control the budget at the campaign level

title_zh: Retargeting 多人群重叠时用 CBO 防过曝
summary_zh: Retargeting campaign 里的 social engagers 和 website visitors 通常有 30%+ 用户重叠,如果用 ad-set budget 各自跑预算,同一个人会被两个 ad set 同时反复触达,frequency 飙到 7-8+,投资回报急剧下降。CBO 会在重叠人群处自动协调,避免双重曝光。Amazon 类比:同一品类下跑多条 SD audience(views remarketing 30/60/90 天)时,长窗口包含短窗口,需要 negative product targeting / 用 portfolio 级预算管控防止互相吃量。
quote_en: one of the best things that CBO can do is prevent audience saturation and when you're targeting a campaign of social engages and website visitors there's a pretty good likelihood that some people are gonna be in both audiences and when you use CBO you're actually guarding from over saturating those people who are in both audiences

title_zh: 用'读什么'+ '花钱在哪'画消费者侧写,做 interest 包
summary_zh: Dara 的核心 interest targeting 框架:不要只塞一个兴趣关键词,而是叠加 10+ 个出版物 + 竞品 + 周边消费品牌。问 3 个问题:(1) 他们看什么新闻 / 杂志(NYT, Vogue, Refinery29)?(2) 他们日常 / 偶尔的爱好上花钱(Whole Foods 买菜,瑜伽用品)?(3) 直接 + aspirational 竞品(他们 follow 的大牌)?越多元越能锁定真实人群。Amazon 端没有 interest targeting,但选 SD audience -> in-market / lifestyle / interests segment 时同理 — 不要只挑一个 segment,把'同品类 in-market + 周边生活方式 + 高单价相关 lifestyle'三层叠加。
quote_en: the publications we read tell a lot about us, and the more that you include, the more that you're going to be zeroing in on your potential customer... compiling a list of all the brands that your potential customers spend money on. I call this the brand spending ad set

title_zh: Lookalike 必跑 4 个变种:purchase / 30 天新客 / VIP / LTV
summary_zh: Dara 的 lookalike 必测组合不是单一'购买 lookalike',而是 4 个 — (1) pixel purchase 直接 lookalike;(2) Shopify 全量购买名单上传后做 lookalike;(3) 最近 30 天新客 lookalike(Black Friday 阶段最有用,扩大新客层);(4) VIP / 高 AOV / 多次复购客户 lookalike,或直接用 LTV lookalike。每个种子人群对应不同价值层,产生的 LAL 人群结构差异显著。Amazon 没有 lookalike,但概念可迁移到 SD audience: views remarketing 拆 7/14/30/60/90 天多个时间窗,每个窗口当作一个'相似种子'独立投放,看哪个窗口转化最高。
quote_en: the most obvious, but frankly most powerful look-alike you need in your Facebook ads campaign is a look-alike based on purchases. But, there's tons of ways to do this and I recommend that you try them all... new customer look-alike. So, these are people who have purchased within the last 30 days

title_zh: Retargeting frequency 上限 4,过了就停或换素材
summary_zh: Dara 给 retargeting campaign 的硬指标:frequency ≤ 4。一旦超过 4,同一个人在窗口内被反复触达 5 次以上,转化没增加但 CPM 拉高、用户产生反感。她的做法是:监控 frequency,接近 4 时要么扩大人群(加新 audience source),要么换 creative 让广告看起来'是新的',要么暂停那条 ad set。Amazon 类比:SD remarketing 没有 frequency 列,但可以用 impression / clicks per ASIN 推算,投同一组 audience 超过 2 周后 CTR 会显著掉,到那个点必须换主图 / 标题 / lifestyle 视频。
quote_en: For retargeting campaigns, I like to keep my frequency at a four or below. So, as long as you follow that guideline, you're not going to be hitting the same people up over and over again that have no interest in purchasing

title_zh: DPA retargeting 窗口先 7 天,确认有效再扩 30/60/180
summary_zh: DPA(catalog sales 动态产品广告)的 retargeting 窗口策略和普通 social engager retargeting 不同:DPA 必须 from short to long(先 7 天再 14、30、60、180),原因是 DPA 用产品白底图很素,新鲜度衰减极快;而 social engager retargeting 因为不断换 creative,可以一上来就开 365 天窗口。这是 creative 多样性 vs 单一性决定窗口长度的实操规则。Amazon 类比:SD product targeting 投竞品页的素材如果只有主图(单一),retargeting 频次必须更密;如果配 lifestyle 视频 + carousel,可以拉长投放周期。
quote_en: for your dynamic product ads catalog sales campaigns, go ahead and start at seven days, but when you find success with it, go ahead and bump it up to 14, bump it up to 21 or 30... we're much more often changing up the creative there, as opposed to the dynamic product ads, those are most likely just going to be images of your products that are taken directly from your product catalog

title_zh: Detailed Targeting Expansion 始终勾选,但别指望救烂广告
summary_zh: Dara 在大量账户上测过:勾上'detailed targeting expansion'(允许 FB 越界找算法觉得会买的人)从未让任何 ad set 表现变差,通常会带来轻微正向。但她也警告:这不是银弹,烂 ad set 不会因为勾这个就翻盘,好 ad set 也不会因为勾这个就崩。规则就是无脑勾,作为'让算法多个自由度'的 default。Amazon 类比:SP campaign 的 dynamic bid down only / up and down 选择类似 — 默认开 dynamic bid up and down 让算法在高转化时段自动加价,但前提是 listing / creative 本身能转化。
quote_en: I have tested this rigorously and I have never seen detailed targeting expansion negatively impact one of my campaigns... this tactic is no silver bullet the changes that's going to ultimately make are pretty miniscule

title_zh: 预算决定人群大小:< $8K/月用 1-2.5M,$10K+ 用 4M+
summary_zh: Dara 测过几百个账户:audience size 不是越精准越好,而是要匹配预算。月 < $8K 时用 1-2.5M(1% LAL 量级),给算法刚好够找人但不会跑空;月 $10K+ 时必须开到 4M-20M,因为预算大了再用小人群会反复轰炸同一批人 frequency 飙升、CPM 暴涨。规则:scale 不仅是加预算,人群也要同步扩大。Amazon 类比:SP/SD 加预算时,同时要扩 keyword set / 增加 ASIN targeting 范围,死守 5-10 个核心词加预算只会把那几个词的 ACOS 推高。
quote_en: if you are spending under 8 km month on Facebook ad I really do find the 1 million to two and a half million to be the sweet spot... when I'm working with a brand that's spending 10 K or more per month on ads I really am looking for those audience sizes that are 4 million or more sometimes up to 20 million

title_zh: 拆 click-through vs view-through conversion 看用户路径
summary_zh: FB 默认显示的 purchase 数是 click + view-through 合并值。Dara 的常规动作是去 columns 把两个数据拆开:click-through 是直接点广告下单的;view-through 是看了广告但没点、之后通过别的渠道(Google 搜品牌)下的单。view-through 占比高 = 你的广告主要在做'品牌种草',直接 ROAS 算法可能会低估它的价值。Amazon 类比:Amazon 没有 view-through 这层,但 SD/SB attributed sales 也会被低估,因为很多用户看到 SB 广告后回搜品牌名走自然流量,这部分被算成 organic。看 New-to-brand metric + branded search 增量是补救方法。
quote_en: this number is actually the result of two numbers being put together one that is for conversions that are attributed to clicks and the other are conversions that are attributed to view threes... I would be in the habit of looking often at this data so you can know exactly how your customers are interacting with your ads

title_zh: 95% 时间用 daily budget,大促才切 lifetime budget
summary_zh: Dara 实战 95% 时间都用 daily budget,理由:lifetime budget 让 FB 知道'你只打算花这么多',算法收手太早,导致整体表现 lackluster。daily budget 让算法每天都尽力争取,数据更连续。例外:Black Friday、Cyber Monday、Memorial Day 等限时促销期用 lifetime budget,因为客户给的就是固定总预算,而且 FB 此时会努力在窗口内冲量。Retargeting 永远 daily,不要 lifetime。Amazon 类比:Amazon 没 lifetime budget,但 budget cap + portfolio 级别预算分配类似 — 大促期才用 portfolio 锁总预算,日常 campaign daily budget 单独管理。
quote_en: i use daily budgets i have not seen that big of a difference in using lifetime budgets... sometimes i actually think it slows down my performance because facebook isn't thinking long term for the campaign or ad set and essentially it's only gathering enough results until the end of the lifetime

title_zh: 盯 link click vs landing page view 差值揪 LP 速度问题
summary_zh: Dara 必盯的一个 KPI 对子:link clicks vs landing page views。差值越大说明用户点了广告但没真正落到落地页 — 99% 是页面在移动端加载太慢,用户失去耐心关掉。如果 LP view 只有 link click 的 50%,这就是大问题,要立刻去做 LP 速度优化。还要盯 ATC vs purchase 比率看 funnel 卡点。Amazon 类比:Amazon 端等价指标是 detail page view rate (DPVR) — SD 广告 click 后有多少真的落到 ASIN 详情页。Amazon 自己不显示这个,但你能从 SP report 的 7-day vs 14-day attribution 推断出'流量到了但没买'的比例。
quote_en: we can look at the discrepancy between link links and landing page views to see if people are actually landing on the website when they intend to if they aren't then that might be a sign that your website is actually loading too slow particularly on mobile

title_zh: Retargeting frequency > 5 立刻砍预算,过曝杀转化
summary_zh: Dara 把 frequency 列固定在每日报表里,主要监控 retargeting campaign。一旦 frequency 超过 5,说明同一个用户在窗口内被同条广告轰炸 5+ 次,购买意愿没增加但 CPM 暴涨、用户开始反感(隐性 brand damage)。规则:看到 frequency > 5 就砍预算或加新 audience。Amazon 类比:SD audience remarketing 没有 frequency 字段,但同等手段是看 impressions / unique-asin-pageview 比值,或者轮换 creative(主图、视频、文案)制造'新鲜感'防过曝。
quote_en: another thing we want a creep of close eye on is frequency particularly for those retargeting campaigns so that we don't have too much of a budget going to them because if we see those getting really high like above a 5 then we'll know to reduce the budget

title_zh: Lookalike 种子人群 100 人能跑,1000 人才好
summary_zh: FB 官方说 100 人就能创建 lookalike,但 Dara 从 FB rep 内部得到的数据是:种子人群 1000+ 才能跑出真正高质量的 LAL。原理:种子越多,FB 算法对'你客户长什么样'的 embedding 越准,扩展出的人群匹配度越高;100 人种子的 LAL 实际上是高方差噪声。Amazon 类比:SD audience -> views remarketing 也是,种子的 ASIN/类目越窄、用户越少,扩展出来的 in-market segment 越不准。新 listing 不要急着开 SD audience,等 detail page view 累计到几千再开。
quote_en: the official answer is is that you meet a hundred people in a custom audience to be able to create a look-alike audience however I've heard from my facebook reps that the optimal amount to have in these custom audiences is actually around a thousand which is where I think this major discrepancy is

title_zh: 用 automatic placements,别人为分割版位
summary_zh: Dara 几年前一直手动分版位(Facebook feed / Instagram feed / desktop / mobile 各开一个 ad set),2020 后她全切回 automatic placements。原因:FB 算法变聪明了,它会自动找每个用户成本最低的版位。手动限制等于把算法的脚绑住,结果是 CPM 上升、转化下降。唯一例外:Instagram Stories 因为画幅完全不同(9:16 全屏)需要专门做 creative,这种情况下单独拆出 IG Stories ad set。Amazon 类比:SD 的 placement(详情页 / off-Amazon)不要手动限制,SP 的 top of search / product pages bid 调整也不要一开始就手动 +50%,先让算法自己找。
quote_en: i have always found that i get better performance when i don't restrict facebook so allowing facebook to actually choose where they think it's best to show my ad has always given me better results... a few years ago even up to about one year to 18 months ago i was almost always segmenting my ad sets by placement

title_zh: Instagram Stories 需要单独 creative,不能复用 feed 素材
summary_zh: Dara 唯一手动拆版位的场景是 Instagram Stories。Stories 是 9:16 全屏,前 1 秒就要抓住注意力,文案位置 / logo / CTA 全要重画。如果直接把 feed 的方形或横版素材投到 Stories,上下黑边 + 白色文案被 UI 挡住 = 必死。规则:专门为 Stories 拍一套素材,然后 ad set A 跑 Stories only,ad set B 跑剩下所有版位。Amazon 类比:Sponsored Brand 主图视频(横版 + 竖版需求不同)、SD video 在 detail page 嵌入(竖版优先) — 不同位置必须配不同尺寸 creative,不要复用一套素材投全部 placement。
quote_en: particularly when i'm making creative that's made especially for instagram stories so when i have specific instagram stories content i do like to segment that out... i would have one ad set that's just for instagram stories and another ad set that has all the placements selected except for instagram stories

title_zh: 广告位减少时不要跟风加价，先优化质量分
summary_zh: Google 取消右侧广告导致竞价位减少、CPC 上压。Ed 反对盲目加价，原因是大家集体抬价只让平台获利。正确做法：用 Ad Preview 检查自己排在哪、把所有 ad extension（站点链接、附加说明、评价）开足，让广告占位变大；同时主攻 quality score（关键词→广告→落地页相关性），这才是降 CPC 的根本杠杆。Amazon SP/SD 同理：竞争加剧时先优化关键词-listing 相关性而不是无脑提 bid。
quote_en: instead of bidding up improve the one overarching factor that reduces your bids and that's your quality score um essentially relevance of the advert to the search term trigger in the ad and to the landing page

title_zh: 低毛利产品砍 SKU，集中预算到高转化关键词
summary_zh: 竞争加剧时低毛利产品最先被挤出。Ed 给中小广告主的解法是砍掉低毛利投放、只跑高毛利或历史已转化的 top sellers/keywords，其余全部砍掉。原理：预算有限时，分散到弱品/弱词只是把钱送给平台。Amazon SP 同理：账户预算紧张时先砍 ACoS 高、转化少的 ASIN 和长尾词，把弹药集中到证明能赚钱的几个 SKU + 词。
quote_en: you can be more selective in what you advertise and just go for your your high margin or your your top sellers or if you're a service business just literally focus on the keywords that have brought conversions and forget everything else

title_zh: 5-10% 关键词花掉 90% 预算，先优化它们
summary_zh: Ed 在审计客户账户时发现典型分布：5-10% 的关键词在烧掉绝大部分预算，剩下的几乎不花钱。所以优化资源应集中在头部消费词上 - 这是杠杆最大的地方。低 QS（1-3）直接删，4-6 才是要重点改的（拆出去做单独 ad group、改广告文案对齐搜索词）。Amazon SP 同理：定期按 spend 倒序排关键词/ASIN，优化集中在头部，长尾低消费词不值得花 30 分钟去改。
quote_en: if you actually look at your account from a keyword level you'll find typically that sort of five to 10% of your keywords are spending all your money and the vast majority aren't uh and there for it's a case of you want to optimize and pay attention to and focus on this top percentile

title_zh: 把高转化关键词单独拆成 single keyword ad group
summary_zh: Single Keyword Ad Group（SKAG）做法：把已转化的高表现关键词从混合 ad group 里抽出来，单独建 ad group + 专属广告文案 + 专属落地页。原理：相关性最大化 → CTR 升 → QS 升 → CPC 降。Ed 警告别一次拆成几百个还指向同一落地页，那就失去意义。Amazon SP 直接对应：Exact Match 单关键词单独 campaign（高表现词隔离投），与 broad/auto 分开预算和 bid。
quote_en: find your really really high performing keywords that convert uh that are mixed up with other other keywords in other AD groups and strip them out and give them their own uh essentially their own budget and their own air to breathe

title_zh: 广告 A/B 测试用 CTR × CVR 综合评分挑赢家
summary_zh: Ed 用一个极简公式判断哪条广告该留：CTR × CVR = score，分高的留下。原因：只看 CTR 会留下吸引点击但不转化的标题党；只看 CVR 会留下点击量太小不显著的广告；相乘平衡两者。Amazon SB/SD 创意 A/B 测试同理：不要只看 ROAS 或只看 CTR，要把点击率和转化率乘起来综合判断哪个素材/标题/图片该胜出。
quote_en: if you had three ads in an ad group you'd literally take the clickthrough rate times conversion rate it give you a score and that would tell you from a balance perspective which ad is is is working

title_zh: CPA 才是终极指标，QS / 排名 / CPC 都是中间变量
summary_zh: Ed 反对纠结于单一中间指标：QS 只影响 ad rank，ad rank 只影响 CPC，CPC 只影响 CPA - 终极看的是 CPA / 利润。如果优化 QS 没让 CPA 下降，那就是无用功。Amazon SP 同理：ACoS、CTR、CPC 都是中间值，最终判断标准是单 ASIN 实际利润（扣完佣金、广告、退货后），不要因为某个中间指标好看就保留亏损 SKU。
quote_en: quality score impacts your ad rank your ad rank impacts your cost per click but crucially your cost per click is what impacts your cost per acquisition and at the end of the day your cost per acquisition always wins

title_zh: 审计窗口看 90 天，30 天数据噪音太大
summary_zh: Ed 做账户审计的硬规则：拉数据看至少 90 天（一个季度），不要只看 30 天。原因：30 天容易被一个旺季周末或一次 promo 扭曲判断；90 天能看到稳态的 keyword/ASIN 表现。另外审计前要先查 change history，避免在别人刚改完动作之后立刻评估。Amazon SP 同理：判断关键词/ASIN 是否该砍，至少看 90 天累计 ACoS 和订单数，不要被某周突发表现误导。
quote_en: if you're doing a an audit I'd recommend going back sort of 90 days the past quarter you can even do a whole year it does depend on your market so use a bit of Common Sense bit of logic goes into that but yeah be careful of 30 days

title_zh: ad group 关键词不超过 20 个，超了就拆
summary_zh: Ed 给的硬规则：单个 ad group 关键词超过 20 个就该拆。理由：关键词太多必然主题不紧密，无法对一组词写出针对性广告/落地页，CTR 和 QS 都会被拉下水。拆成更小、主题更紧的 ad group 让广告文案精确匹配 → CTR 升 → QS 升 → CPC 降。Amazon SP campaign 结构同理：一个 ad group 塞 50+ 个关键词时该按主题（功能词 / 品牌词 / 竞品词）拆开。
quote_en: take look out for for ad groups that got more than 20 keywords as a rule of thumb because it's highly likely that they aren't closely related and closely or thematically linked together and that's what you want to achieve

title_zh: Impression Share < 95% 且 CPA 达标 → 立刻加预算
summary_zh: Ed 的预算决策快速法：把关键词按 cost 排序，加上 cost-per-conversion 和 search impression share 两列。条件成立就加预算：CPA 在目标内 + impression share < 95-97%。原理：钱已经在赚，但 IS 没满意味着还有需求没接住。Amazon SP 同理：当某关键词 ACoS 低于目标且 IS 不饱和（或 budget cap 经常触顶），加预算就是直接扩单的最快动作。
quote_en: so long as that their their CPA their cost per sale per lead per acquisition is under your target uh and this account is Believe It or Not £500 uh because their their leads are worth a lot of money so all these keywords are falling under that then that means that if your search impression share is low I.E less than 95 97% you've got room to bump the budget up

title_zh: 用自己的 day-parting 数据决定投放时段，不听通用建议
summary_zh: Ed 反对用网上通用的 best-time-to-convert 建议。做法：导出 hour-of-day × day-of-week 的 cost-per-conversion 数据，做透视表 + 条件格式色阶（红=亏，绿=赚），把目标 CPA 设为中点。结果一目了然——这个客户周末和周一凌晨 6 点都在烧钱。原理：每个生意的客户作息不同，泛用建议会害人。Amazon SP 也支持 dayparting（部分账户），同样应基于自己 14 天/30 天 hour×day 数据决策，不抄同行。
quote_en: don't Google it don't listen to best practices don't listen to other people because they're not looking at your data use your own data it takes 10 15 minutes of your time at the most

title_zh: Day-parting 改时先做粗调，别立刻精修每小时 bid
summary_zh: Ed 警告优化时段时不要一上来就做小时级 bid 调整。正确顺序：先粗砍明显在烧钱的整段时间（如周末全关 / 凌晨 6 点全关），观察 1-2 周让数据稳态后，再回头做小时级精细调整。原因：粗调本身会改变剩余时段的流量分布，精修在数据未稳前没意义。Amazon SP 调整时段也一样：先按周维度 / 大时段砍/加，别在第一次就调 24 个小时×7 天 = 168 个 bid。
quote_en: don't start making too many changes too soon I I'd go for a a more broad Strokes approach so finding uh particular hour ranges or day ranges that just don't work and remove those because they will have a KnockOn effect to your remaining active hours

title_zh: 把 5-10% 头部表现的预算上调，其他下调
summary_zh: Ed 总结的设备/平台 bid 调整通用法则：把头部 5-10% 表现最好的 campaigns/ad groups/keywords 加预算，剩下的减预算或砍掉。即'put money in what works and take money away from what doesn't'。原理：广告回报是高度长尾分布，把钱集中到证明能赚的少数 winner 是 ROI 最高的动作。Amazon SP 同理：每周复盘时按 ROAS 排序，砍尾、加头，不要一直平均分配预算。
quote_en: you take your five 10% top performers in your your campaigns you know your ad groups your keywords and it's as simple as that really put money in what works and take money away from from what doesn't

title_zh: 新流量先做 awareness，再 demand，最后才推转化
summary_zh: Ed 用 5 阶段（awareness/demand/transactions/adoption/advocacy）跑社媒。冷流量第一接触不是产品广告，而是与产品相关的有用内容（教育/娱乐/竞赛），让品牌先 ingratiate 进入用户视野；建过 audience 后才慢慢推转化（trial-before-buy 这种低承诺 offer，不是直接 hard sell）。Amazon 卖家做站外引流时同理：冷流量直接砸购买广告 CTR 低、ROAS 烂；先用 reels/short-form 内容种草，等承接 review 和评分跑起来再推 SD 转化。
quote_en: at the awareness stage we avoid self-promotional content instead we we want to ingratiate your brand with your new audience

title_zh: 推广 post 不超过 20%，否则用户疲劳烧掉信任
summary_zh: Ed 给的硬比例：直接卖货/品牌推广 post 占比不超过 20%，剩下 80% 必须是有用/有趣的内容。原因：过度推广会触发 audience 疲劳，CTR 一旦掉下来后续广告 CPC 也会上压。Amazon 卖家做品牌帖、社媒种草同理：连续硬广 review 和 engagement 都会塌，要混入 how-to、客户开箱、行业知识，给后面的促销 post 留权重。
quote_en: we set expectations early by committing to typically no more than 20% branded directly promotional posts stick to that rule and people won't Tire of your brand

title_zh: 盯三个核心指标就行：CPA / CTR / Frequency
summary_zh: Ed 反对盯一墙的指标。CPA 是最终决策（落进目标 CPA 就是赢）；CTR 检查广告-人群匹配度（<2% 就要换素材或人群，目标 3-4%+，5-10% 是真匹配）；Frequency 检查 audience 是否被烧坏（<5 安全，>10 危险，会被标 junk）。Amazon SP 同理：盯 ACoS（=CPA 类）+ CTR（创意-listing 匹配信号）+ Impression frequency（同一 ASIN 反复曝光给同一受众会掉权重）。其他指标都是噪音。
quote_en: the three critical metrics that I pay attention to is cost per acquisition your CPA your clickthrough rate your CTR and the frequency that people see your ads

title_zh: Relevance score 高 = CPC 低，雪球效应不可逆
summary_zh: Ed 警告：相关性分数（FB 1-10，类比 Google QS）低于平均会让平台优先展示别人的广告，你的 CPC 越来越贵 - 这是雪球效应，越烂越烂。Amazon SP 同理：广告 relevance（关键词与 listing 标题/bullet/类目的契合度）直接影响竞价权重 - 不要用 SP 投跟产品弱相关的关键词去抢流量，会进入劣化循环；优化 listing 文案让相关性赢过同类目竞品才是省钱根本。
quote_en: an above average relevancy score directly correlates to spending Less on ads so consider that when Facebook ads has to decide which ad to display to a specific user the algorithm will have a preference to the more relevant ad being shown first if that ad isn't yours it quickly becomes more expensive to advertise and this this effect unfortunately snowballs over time

title_zh: 新手别自己拼 audience，先用平台算法
summary_zh: Ed 反对新手广告主一上来就自己拼 demographic + behavior 组合。理由：'it can be difficult to beat the system' - 平台 audience 算法在 1500+ 数据点上做匹配，人手拍脑袋的组合很难赢过它。建议先用 lookalike + retargeting 几个开箱即用的方案，让数据先跑起来。Amazon SP 同理：新手不要一上来就自己手拼 ASIN 列表去定向，先用 Auto campaign 或 SP 推荐关键词让 Amazon 算法跑出 winner，再做手动定向。
quote_en: for new advertisers in particular, uh it can be often quite difficult to beat the system. So, let's use the tools at our disposal

title_zh: 每个 ad set 至少测 3 张图，图片影响最大
summary_zh: Ed 的硬规则：每个 ad set 至少跑 3 张不同图，最好 12 张。理由：'an image will have the biggest impact of all your ads performance' - 文案、headline 都没换、只换图，CTR 和 CVR 都能差几倍。Amazon SD/SB 直接对应：主图（特别是 SB 视频/SD 创意图）是最大杠杆，文案变化的边际收益远不如图片。每个广告组至少准备 3 个素材轮测，淘汰输家。
quote_en: always test at the very least three different images per ad set. So, Facebook audiences are very sensitive to imagery. An image will have the the biggest impact of all your ads performance

title_zh: Search 是 pull、Social 是 push，性质不同别混管
summary_zh: Ed 强调 Search（Google）和 Social（Facebook）本质不同：Search 是 pull - 用户主动搜，意图明确；Social 是 push - 你打断用户 timeline。意图带来转化效率，但贵；push 便宜，但要靠内容铺垫。Amazon SP 关键词广告 = pull（用户搜了才出现），SD/受众投放 = push 性质（推送给浏览过的用户）。两者要分开评估 ROAS - 不能用同一个 ACoS 阈值衡量 SP 关键词和 SD 受众扩展。
quote_en: Facebook is currently cheaper per click than Google however Google is more buyer orientated because people search with intent you know they I am looking for X or you know I need assistance with y so on Facebook you're pushing ads into people's timelines and essentially interrupting them whereas on Google you're not people are actively searching so it's it's quite a different approach one's push one's pull

title_zh: 选择越少转化越高 - Jam 实验：6 款 vs 24 款
summary_zh: 经典 Jam 实验：超市设品鉴台，6 款果酱时 30% 路人买，24 款时只有 3% 买 - 选项多反而瘫痪决策。Ed 用这个反对首页堆产品。Amazon listing 直接对应：A+ 模块、变体下拉、bundle 选项都不要塞太多 - 同 ASIN 给 6 个 variant 比给 24 个 variant 转化率更高；首屏前 3-5 个核心卖点远胜过 10 个并列特性。
quote_en: they discovered that 3% of people purchased from the 24 Jam display which is okay whereas 30% purchased from the six Jam display that's a 10-fold increase in sales

title_zh: 用 site search 数据找'用户真正想买什么'
summary_zh: Ed 在 GA 看 site-search 转化率是非搜索用户的 2 倍，session value 也翻倍。逻辑：搜索用户已经知道要什么 - 那些被搜的关键词就是真实需求信号。把搜索量大的 SKU 推到首页，而不是堆促销品。Amazon 同理：Brand Analytics 的 Search Query Performance 报告就是这个角色 - 看哪些查询带来你品牌点击却没转成你 ASIN 的购买，那就是 listing 没接住的真实需求，应该用这些词单独建 SP exact 广告 + 优化 listing 标题。
quote_en: site search tells you what your customers want so if people who search convert really well the logic would suggest that uh get more people to search right that's not entirely true what we actually want to do is make the products that people search for easier to find in the first place

title_zh: 用 GA 数据校准 audience 年龄/性别，别拍脑袋
summary_zh: Ed 反对在 Facebook 投放设置时凭感觉选年龄段和性别。做法：先去 GA 看过去 90 天 Demographics，对每个年龄段比较 sessions、转化率、订单价值 - 通常会发现流量最大的年龄段不是转化最强的。把广告人群按真实转化数据收紧，而不是按平台默认值。Amazon SD audience 投放完全同理：Brand Analytics + 后台报告告诉你真正下单的是哪个年龄/性别段，把 SD 受众扩展按这个方向收，不要广撒网。
quote_en: using your actual visitor data you can hone your audience targeting to get in front of the right people who are more likely to buy from you

title_zh: 看 per-session value 而不是单纯转化率
summary_zh: Ed 演示评估 audience 段时不只看转化率，还看 per-session value（总收入 / 总会话数）。原因：高转化率但客单价低的人群可能不如低转化率但高客单价的人群赚钱。Amazon SP 同理：单看 ACoS 会误判 - 低 ACoS 词如果客单价低、利润薄，反而不如稍高 ACoS 但带高客单价 SKU 的词。决策时把 spend per session/click × AOV 一起看才能避免被单一指标误导。
quote_en: the per session value simply a divisible some so total revenue divided by total sessions it's for wrong online stores in particular it's a good indicator of sales performance you can use it on any traffic channel or a demographic

title_zh: Broad match 会触发同义词，必须主动加 negatives
summary_zh: Ed 回答匹配类型问题：即使是 Modified Broad Match 也会触发 misspellings、单复数、缩写、词根（floor/flooring 算同一）。要收紧只能靠 negative keywords - 用同义词典找出所有不想要的近义词，作为单词级 negatives 加入。Amazon SP 直接对应：Broad / Phrase 关键词必然会跑出大量 customer search term 噪音，每周必须从 search term report 里把跑出但不转化的词加进 negative exact，否则预算被吃掉。
quote_en: the only way to tighten this up and by the way this happens with exact match as well. It's not it's not exactly exact but um particularly in the case of broad modified it's even worse if you're not wanting to trigger for employee for example you need to negative that out and you need to negative out all the specific words that you don't want

title_zh: 每个 ad group 放 2 条广告，便于 A/B 测试
summary_zh: Ed 的硬规则：每个 ad group 放 2 条广告（不是 1 条也不是 3-5 条）。1 条没法测；3+ 条流量被分散，谁赢谁输要等很久才显著。判定胜者用 CTR × CVR 公式，highest 留下。Amazon SP/SB 创意 A/B 同理：每个 campaign/ad group 同时跑 2 个素材就好，多了流量分散统计显著太慢；每隔 2-3 周淘汰输家、加新挑战者。
quote_en: you have two adverts per ad group uh if you have one you can't split test if you have more than two you take longer to test your ad

title_zh: ad group 关键词越少越好，1 个也行
summary_zh: Ed 反驳'每个 ad group 放 20+ 关键词'的常见建议（甚至 Google 自己建议）。逻辑：关键词越少越能写精准的广告文案 + 落地页；即使只有 1 个关键词也完全 OK。规则：硬上限 10 个，超了就主题不再紧密。Amazon SP 同理：高表现的 exact 关键词应单独 ad group（甚至单独 campaign）跑，不要跟 broad / 长尾混在一起，否则没法精准控制 bid 和预算。
quote_en: keep your ad groups as thin on keywords as you possibly can if that means you've got one keyword in one AD group that's absolutely fine in doing so you can tailor the advert copy and the landing page perfectly to your keyword so don't be afraid to go too granular it's more effective

title_zh: Exact 关键词单独 ad group，跟 broad/phrase 分开
summary_zh: Ed 的关键词组织法：Exact 单独建 ad group + 单独广告文案；Broad Modified 和 Phrase 可以合并到另一些 ad groups。原因：Exact 是高表现高转化词（最终会占 80% 预算），混在 broad 里会被低性能词稀释相关性、拉低 QS。Amazon SP 直接照搬：高 ROAS 的 exact 词单独成 campaign（自己定 bid 和 budget），broad/auto 跑挖词，定期把跑出的好词晋升到 exact campaign。
quote_en: I would keep exact on their own we've brought modified and phrase match together in other ad groups the I bit idea being that exact are highly told to their own ad and not mixed in with the other the other adword the other keywords

title_zh: DKI 是临时止血，长期靠手写差异化文案
summary_zh: Ed 对 Dynamic Keyword Insertion（DKI）持保留态度：能短期拉 CTR，但长期不如手写、和竞品有差异的文案。陷阱：如果 ad group 关键词太杂，DKI 插入的词会让广告读起来语病、显得低质。更好的动态变量：日期/月份、地理位置、库存倒计时 - 这些是真实有用的差异化。Amazon SB 同理：自动生成的素材模板能上量但天花板低，长期赢家是手写文案 + 高品质自定义图片。
quote_en: longer term just very well-written adverts that are different to your competitors work much much better so DK is kind of like a quick fix

title_zh: 归因窗口选 7 天点击,别用 1 天
summary_zh: iOS 14.5 后 Facebook 大量数据丢失,归因窗口选择直接影响能看到多少转化。Konstantinos 强调 1 天点击归因会严重低估广告效果,7 天点击才能反映真实转化路径,因为很多用户不会立刻下单。这个原则对 Amazon 同样关键: SD/SB 默认 14 天归因,看长归因窗口能避免误杀真实在出单的活动,做决策时不要只看 1 天。
quote_en: if you're using 1-day attribution, you are wrong. So stop doing it. It's very good news that we are starting to see now, the aggregated events being used for the 7-days attribution.

title_zh: 数据丢失期反而是抬高出价机会窗
summary_zh: Konstantinos 反向看 iOS 14.5 后的混乱期: 大量中小广告主因为投不动会离场,广告竞价压力下降,留下来的人反而能享受更低 CPM。原理是行业洗牌时存活者有红利。Amazon 同理: 旺季前后大量同行因 ACoS 暴涨暂停广告时,反而是抬出价抢位的好时机,Sponsored Display 拍卖竞争降低,Bid 策略可以更激进。
quote_en: Whoever can't afford it anymore and whoever can't make the ads work anymore, will leave the platform and in my opinion this will be the reason for the rising cost of advertising on the Facebook platform to at last start dropping

title_zh: 店铺评分低于 3 分流量质量必崩
summary_zh: Facebook 内部对每个主页有 1-5 分的 Feedback Score,低于 3 分账户流量质量明显变差,低于 1 分直接封号。原因是平台用客户满意度反向决定广告分发权重。Amazon 完全对应: listing 的 review 评分、退货率、A-to-Z 索赔率会进入 Account Health,差评 listing 投 SD/SB 会被压曝光、抬高 CPC。Grace 投放前应先看 listing 健康度,差的 ASIN 不要硬推。
quote_en: from 1 to 3, the ad account is going to have very bad quality of traffic and the results are going to be extremely bad. And then above 3 to 5, you are having very good score.

title_zh: Dynamic Creative 拆分必看素材级数据
summary_zh: Konstantinos 演示在 Dynamic Creative 广告里点 Breakdown by Dynamic Creative,可以看到哪条视频/哪条文案带来大部分销售。原理是 DCA 把多素材打包跑,不拆数据等于黑盒,无法迭代。Amazon SB 视频广告和 SD 多创意位等价场景: 必须按 creative ID 拆 ACoS 和 CTR,把没出单的素材关掉,把胜出的素材复制到新 campaign 加预算,而不是让算法替你决定。
quote_en: we can come to breakdown and we can do by Dynamic Creative, we can see about images and we can see that now we have this segmentation and we know that this video for example has the majority of the sales.

title_zh: 别盲信平台自动化,要用外部数据验证
summary_zh: Konstantinos 怀疑 Facebook Automatic Placements 把钱故意花在低产出版位,只是为了让平台多收钱。他建议用 UTM + Google Analytics 做外部交叉验证,不要只信广告后台。Amazon 同样陷阱: Sponsored Display auto-targeting 和 SB 自动版位会把预算撒到低 ROAS 的位置。Grace 应该用 Brand Analytics、Search Query Performance、ASIN 级 Business Report 做第二信源,验证广告后台的 ACoS 是不是真实情况。
quote_en: what if this is a conspiracy, okay, what if Facebook wants you to spend in all of the placements, even if they know that it's going to optimize at the end of the day for Facebook Feed and Instagram Feed and Instagram Stories.

title_zh: 看不到细分就靠花钱方向反推效果
summary_zh: Breakdown 报告下线后,Konstantinos 用一个变通方法: 看 Facebook 把钱花在哪个年龄段/版位上,反推算法判断的高产出群体。如果整体 ROAS 健康,说明算法判断对; 如果不健康,这些花钱方向就是问题源。Amazon 类似场景: 当 Search Term Report 数据滞后或缺失时,看 campaign 里哪些 ASIN/keyword 拿走最多 spend,如果整体 ACoS 烂,优先关掉吃预算最多的那几个。
quote_en: You won't be able to see the exact number of sales but you will be able to know where Facebook is spending your money and guess what if the cost per result is okay, and my business and my campaign is working then perfect!

title_zh: Ecom 第一方数据分 5 类做 audience signal
summary_zh: 对 e-commerce 账户,把第一方客户列表细分成 5 类作为 PMax/Demand Gen 的 audience signal:wishlist creators(高意图)、cart abandoners + checkout drop-offs(最热)、past purchases 再切成 category repeat buyers / seasonal shoppers / brand loyalists / discount hunters / high-ticket buyers、loyalty program members。每个 segment 单独上传,告诉 Google 你想要更多哪类客户。Amazon 没有这种第一方数据回灌的机制,但'按购买行为细分客群'这种思路对 Amazon Posts 受众洞察、新品定位有借鉴价值。
quote_en: For Ecom we have wishlist creators, cart abandoners, checkout drop-offs, past purchases which can be segmented out in category repeat buyers, seasonal shoppers, brand loyaltists, discount hunters and high ticket buyers, and lastly loyalty program members.

title_zh: 用 high-value 客户单独建 list 喂算法
summary_zh: 上传 customer list 时如果总量够大,优先上传'高价值客户'细分包(按累计消费、复购、tier 等级切),不要把所有客户塞一个袋子。原理:你给 Google 看的'种子'决定它去找谁——种子是 ICP 高价值客户,扩量找的就是高价值;种子是混合,扩量得到的就是平均水平。如果量太少才合并上传。Amazon Sponsored Display audience targeting 也支持 view/purchase remarketing,选'高价值 ASIN'做种子比'全 ASIN'更精准。
quote_en: If your list becomes too small and if you have just a few really high value customers, consider uploading One customer list, but it's always better to segment them out if you have the volumes and tell Google what your ideal customer profiles really are.

title_zh: Demand Gen 测试预算门槛 15K-50K 别硬上
summary_zh: Google 官方推荐 Demand Gen 测试预算 15K-50K USD / 4-6 周;按 Target CPA 算要日预算 = 15× tCPA(tCPA 100 欧 → 日预算 1500 欧)。Bob 直接说:中小广告主不要碰 Demand Gen,先把 Search/Shopping/PMax 跑满,再上 Display/Video Action,最后才考虑 Demand Gen。原理:upper-funnel 算法需要海量数据找 ICP,预算不够直接烧光不出量。对 Amazon SD/SB:同理 upper-funnel 品牌曝光产品(SB Video、SD reach)在低预算下别开,先把 SP keyword 跑赢再向上扩。
quote_en: Google actually recommends at least 15K budget for four to six weeks, 15K minimum, and they even say minimum budget, up to 50K. So that's a big range that starts at 15K for just four to six weeks.

title_zh: 上漏斗永远要用第三方归因校准
summary_zh: Demand Gen / YouTube / Display 这类上漏斗 campaign 在 Google ads 里会被 DDA 严重过度归因,看起来很赚钱实际可能在'蹭'下漏斗的转化。Miles 的实操:跑这类 campaign 必须配第三方归因工具(Northbeam、Rockerbox 等),否则 Meta 也声称功劳、Google 也声称功劳,加起来比真实订单多 2-3 倍。对 Amazon:站外引流到 Listing 的 SD reach campaign 看 ACOS 也会偏乐观,要用 Brand Analytics 的 New-to-Brand 比例和总销量上扬来判断真实增量。
quote_en: If you add up all of the conversions then you end up by two three times as many conversions that you actually have inside of your back end. So you definitely need an independent tool to look over the attribution of all of your campaigns.

title_zh: 新 campaign 前 2 周 / 50 转化前不动手
summary_zh: Demand Gen launch 后前 2 周 + 累计 50 转化以内不要做任何调整,这是算法 learning period,Google 需要这点量才能找到你的客户在它生态里在哪。中途改 audience / 改创意 / 改预算会重置学习。这个原则对 Amazon SD/SP 完全通用:新建 campaign 前 7-14 天即使数据难看也别频繁动 bid 和 keyword,等系统跑出 baseline 再优化,否则永远在重启。
quote_en: You want to make sure that you do not make any changes in the first couple of two weeks which is a learning period for the demand gen campaign because Google is saying that it needs at least 50 conversions to properly understand where your audience is hanging out.

title_zh: 上漏斗别照搬下漏斗的 hard-CTA 文案
summary_zh: 上漏斗(Demand Gen / YouTube / Display)用户根本不认识你的品牌,直接搬 PMax / Search 的'Book a demo''Buy now'CTA 转化率会很差。要根据'channel temperature'换软一点的 hook——介绍品牌、抛出问题、给 lead magnet。这个原理转 Amazon:SD reach / SB Video 给冷流量看的图文必须强调'是什么、解决什么问题',不要直接堆'Best Seller、Buy Now'——那是 SP 列表页的语言。
quote_en: Do not copy your performance Max headlines and description lines for example that are focused towards book a consultation now or book a demo now. Those are way too hot and way too warm call to actions for upper funnel and mid funnel campaign types.

title_zh: 上漏斗用 GTag 转化、下漏斗用 OCT
summary_zh: Bob 实操:OCT(offline conversion tracking,导入成交线索)在上漏斗 campaign 里归因经常丢——Display/YouTube/Discovery 拿不到这种 conversion。所以上漏斗 campaign 用 Google ads 自带的 GTag pixel 转化作为 primary,下漏斗 Search/PMax 用 OCT。在一个账户里给不同 campaign 设不同 primary conversion goal。Amazon 没有 OCT,但'不同漏斗位的 campaign 看不同的 conversion 指标'这个思路通用——SP 看 ACOS/CPC,SB/SD 看 NTB% 和总销量增量。
quote_en: What I tend to do is I tend to select OCT conversion actions as a primary conversion action for my search campaign for Legion SAS and for my upper funnel mid funnel campaigns I tend to use a Google tag based conversion action and then just use different primary conversions on campaign level.

title_zh: PMax 用 page feeds 锁定落地页
summary_zh: PMax 默认开'final URL expansion'会自己抓站内任意页投 search,完全不可控。新功能 page feeds 让你建一个 URL 清单,告诉 PMax'只能在这些页投',并且可以在 asset group 级别配置不同 page feed。前提:必须把 final URL expansion 关掉。这是最被期待的'拿回控制权'更新。Amazon 类似机制:SP Auto campaign 没法限定到具体 ASIN 段,可以用'product targeting'campaign 拆出来定向投自己最想推的 ASIN。
quote_en: Page feeds, this is the one that I'm most excited about. With page feeds you can get a bit more control over the DSA Dynamic search ads functionality of performance Max. You can set up a feed with different URLs landing pages and then you can say I only want to target these pages.

title_zh: PMax 用 brand exclusion 排除自己品牌词
summary_zh: PMax 历来'抢'品牌词流量、把 Search 里本来就要转化的品牌搜索算成 PMax 功劳,数据严重虚高。新功能 campaign-level brand exclusions 让你直接在 PMax 排除自己品牌+预定义品牌列表(没有的可申请创建),从 search 和 shopping 位都剔掉。以前要走 negative keyword list workaround(找客服开通),现在原生支持。Amazon 同理:做 SP 投放时品牌词 campaign 单独建,Auto 和 broad 里要用 negative keyword 把自己品牌词加进去,避免互相抢量。
quote_en: Campaign level brand exclusions, with this feature you can exclude branded search terms from pmax campaigns and this excludes them from search and shopping placements. PMax loves to take credit for any conversions including branded conversions which heavily inflates the data.

title_zh: PMax experiments 终于能 A/B 测
summary_zh: 新功能 PMax experiments 支持 PMax-vs-PMax A/B 对比,可以测不同 bid strategy / 不同创意 / final URL expansion 开关 / page feed 开关 等。以前只能 PMax vs Standard Shopping。Miles 强调:不要一次改太多变量,挑一个最值得测的先跑。Amazon 平台测试更野——SP campaign 复制后改一个变量(bid 类型、关键词匹配、ASIN 排除)做 split,但要用同样的 budget 和 daypart,否则没意义。
quote_en: Performance Max experiments, soon we will be able to A/B test two different pmax campaigns against each other and that allows us to test different bid strategies, placements, different assets, use final URL expansion yes or no, use page feeds yes or no.

title_zh: Landing page 7 要素信息层级清单
summary_zh: 高转化 landing page 必须按 information hierarchy 排好 7 个要素:dream outcome(梦想结果)、big problems(痛点)、value(价值)、uniqueness(差异化)、objections(异议处理)、CTA(为什么现在行动)、credibility(信任凭证)。每个 element 都对应一个用户问题。原理:信息不能少(用户没决策依据)也不能多(信息过载,用户跑掉)。Amazon Listing 的 A+ Content 和主图 5 张直接对应这 7 个要素——这套框架可以直接套到 listing 优化。
quote_en: These are the most important information hierarchy elements that you should address on your landing page: dream outcome, big problems and solution, value, uniqueness, objections, call to action, credibility. So those are the seven core components.

title_zh: Above-the-fold 决定是否跳出
summary_zh: Bob 用 Tilmet(travel nursing 招聘)做反面教材:above-the-fold 只放了 headline + sub-headline + 表单,但用户根本不知道'travel nursing job 是什么''你比对手强在哪''有什么社会证明',直接跳。原理:屏幕首屏决定 5 秒内的去留——必须同时回答'你是什么 + 我为什么要选你 + 凭证'。Amazon Listing 主图位 + 标题 + 5 个要点 = 同样的 above-the-fold,首屏没解释清楚价值,用户不会下滑看 A+。
quote_en: Just by looking at the above the fold part of this landing page you're like, I have no idea what's going on here and you're asking me to convert too soon. You're asking me to leave my contact details behind without knowing what your unique value proposition is.

title_zh: 冷流量 LP 多铺内容、热流量 LP 砍到 CTA
summary_zh: 判断 landing page 信息密度的核心是 traffic temperature:冷流量(YouTube / Display 来的人不知道你是谁)需要更多教育型内容,从问题陈述到方案介绍到信任背书一路铺;热流量(Search 高商业意图词)直接给 CTA + 几条核心卖点就够。原理:awareness level 越低,需要的'决策铺垫'越多。Amazon 同理:站内自然搜索流量(热)直接看图听 bullet 就买,站外引流来的(冷)需要 Listing 视频和 A+ 故事铺充分。
quote_en: The colder the traffic, the more content you often need to include, and the warmer the traffic, the more of a transactional or commercial intent the user has, the less content you need to basically let the potential customer complete your call to action.

title_zh: 把账户工作分 3 桶、70/30 时间分配
summary_zh: Bob 把账户优化分 3 类:(1)regular monitoring(每周/每月固定的 SQR 排负、ad asset 测试、结构调整);(2)one-off high-impact improvements(比如上 enhanced conversion、加 first-party 数据);(3)experiments(测新落地页、新 offer、新 bid 策略)。时间默认 70% 给 regular、30% 给一次性+实验;成熟账户(SQR 已经很干净)反过来 30/70。Amazon 同理:不要把所有时间花在每天扫 SP 加负关键词,要留时间测新 ASIN/新 keyword 集/新 SD audience。
quote_en: Generally I think gut feeling wise, I spent 70 percent of my time towards regular optimizations and 30 percent maybe up to 40 percent towards one-off improvements and experiments. That's how I try to allocate my time per client but it differs per client.

title_zh: 实验用 ICE 评分挑顺序
summary_zh: 实验积压一堆没法都做,Bob 用 ICE 模型排序:Impact(影响)、Confidence(信心)、Ease(易实施),每项 1-10 分相加,先做总分最高的——'有把握 + 高影响 + 容易做'。原理:别被高大上但难做的拖慢节奏,先用容易的小赢累积速度。Amazon 同理:测新 keyword 段、改主图、加 SBV 视频、试新 SD audience——每件事先用 ICE 排,先动'当周就能看出效果'的。
quote_en: I like to use the ICE scoring model. The I stands for impact, the C stands for confidence so how sure am I that this will actually perform well, and the E stands for ease so how easy is it to set up. I just start with the experiment that has the highest score.

title_zh: ROAS 转 POAS 利润导向也可能炸盘
summary_zh: Bob 真实翻车案例:把 e-commerce 客户从 ROAS(收入维度)切到 POAS(利润维度)bid strategy,结果转换期销量崩盘 2 周也回不来,只能切回 ROAS 把 POAS 当辅助指标看。教训:看似'更精准'的 bid strategy 切换有学习期成本,4 次中只赌赢 3 次,失败要敢于回滚。Amazon 同理:从 'optimize for sales' 切 'optimize for new-to-brand' 或调 dynamic bid 模式时,留好回滚阈值(2 周或 ACOS 涨 30%),别死撑。
quote_en: Where we tried to transition from a revenue-based ROAS bidding strategy to a profit-based ROAS strategy. It completely backfired. After two weeks we decided to revert back to the revenue based strategy.

title_zh: 登录页 CRO 是优化师下一个杠杆
summary_zh: Bob 强调:Google ads in-app 优化已经被自动化吃了大半,把转化率从 2% 提到 2.5% 的杠杆远比改 bid 大——CR +25% 等于 bid 力 +25%、可入更多 auction、跑量也跟着上。所以高级优化师正越来越多把时间花在 landing page 优化,owns 整条 click-to-conversion 链路。Amazon 同理:SP/SD 的 CPC 在涨,'把 Listing CR 从 8% 提到 12%'的杠杆远超只动 bid——主图、A+、视频、价格、Coupon 才是真正可大提升 ROAS 的地方。
quote_en: If you were to improve your conversion rates by 25%, that's a lot. That's so much more bidding power and it opens up so much more volumes inside of your Google ads campaigns where it also opens up doors for experimenting with mid and upper funnel campaign types.

title_zh: Smart bidding 只买 Google 已知会买的 10%
summary_zh: John Moran 的核心洞察:smart bidding 不是给你扩量,它是把'Google 已经知道会转化'的那 10% 客流锁给你,你出价高就多分点;tROAS / tCPA 越紧、Google 越死锁在这个池子。所以你 spend +50% 但 click 只 +20%、CPC 还涨——根本买不到那剩下的 90%。Jenny Marvin(Google 官方)在 LinkedIn 也确认了'smart bidding does not optimize for incremental impression delivery'。这点对 Amazon SP 'Dynamic bids - up & down' 同理:它优化已知转化,不会主动扩量,真要拿增量得换 fixed bid + 自己控关键词。
quote_en: Smart bidding does not optimize for incremental impression delivery. Google has a finite number of people that it knows are going to convert and whomever spend the most wins them. As you scale that campaign you cap out, that's where you see increase my ad spend and I don't get incremental impressions.

title_zh: 切 manual CPC + YouTube engagement 拿剩 90%
summary_zh: John Moran 的 hack:把 primary conversion 改成 'YouTube engagement'(Google 自带、长期有数据,不会重置学习期),同时 campaign 切 manual CPC。结果 Google 看不到'这个转化对你很值钱',不会把你锁进高价池,CPC 直接砍半,接到的是 sales cycle 更长的冷流量(剩下 90%)。要点:必须配第三方归因 + meta/YouTube remarketing 接住冷流。Amazon 没有 manual CPC 这种 trick,但同源思路:auto campaign 跑久了 ACOS 会卡死,要拆出 manual broad / phrase 重新探索新词。
quote_en: I changed my primary conversion action to YouTube engagements. YouTube engagements is a trusted Google hosted conversion action that doesn't need to be relearned. Google doesn't see that this is valuable to me yet so it's not going to price fix me into the upper auctions.

title_zh: 永远不信平台给的 conversion 数据
summary_zh: John Moran 直接说:Google ads 后台除了'spend'之外的数据都被设计来让你花更多钱,尤其是 conversion tracking。他建议:'练成不看平台 conversion 也能跑好 Google ads 的能力'——以业务真实订单(后台/CRM/独立归因工具)为准,不要拿 Google ads 后台的 conversion 数当真。Amazon 一样:Brand Analytics 和 Business Reports 才是真账,Sponsored Ads 后台报的'attributed sales'有 14 天点击窗,会偷下漏斗自然单的功劳——做品牌 ROI 决策必须看总销量+ NTB%,不只 ACOS。
quote_en: Most of that information inside of it besides your spend is designed to make you spend more money. Never measure the success of your business from looking at anything to do with the conversion tracking inside of Google ads holistically.

title_zh: 卖结果不卖产品:目的地不是机票
summary_zh: Miles 套用 Hormozi 的 'Make offers so good people feel stupid saying no':offer 文案不要列 feature(机票、床垫、敞篷车),要卖 dream outcome(目的地、好觉、风吹脸)。原理:用户买的是改变后的状态,不是产品本身。把每个 pain point 列出来,告诉他们'不行动的代价是什么',再给方案。Amazon Listing 的 bullet 和 A+ 直接套这个模板:不要写'304 不锈钢、容量 2L',要写'省下早晨 10 分钟做早餐的时间、家人多睡半小时'。
quote_en: You do not want to sell a plane ticket but you sell the destination. You do not want to sell the mattress but you want to sell a good night's of sleep. You do not want to sell a convertible but you want to sell the feeling of wind in your hair.

title_zh: 受众越精准、文案越能打
summary_zh: Miles 的反例:'瑜伽教练'这个 positioning 太宽,谁都说不上对。改成'专为孕期妈妈的产前瑜伽专家'——立刻有受众感,文案、关键词、视觉全都能围绕这一群人写。'内容写手'→ '为科技初创公司写技术文章的内容专家'。原理:specific positioning 提高 message-market fit,转化率比泛投高一个量级。Amazon 同理:不要做'多功能水杯',做'户外露营防漏 1L 钛杯'——SP keyword 选词、主图、A+ 都能更聚焦,比 generic listing 的 CR 高 50%+。
quote_en: Prenatal yoga specialist for expecting mothers, content creator specializing in tech articles for startups, Google ads specialist for gyms with 10 plus locations. By being really specific in targeting your dream client segment you can also increase the relevancy of your copy.

title_zh: 5 阶段 awareness 决定推 offer 还是 lead magnet
summary_zh: Eugene Schwartz 的 5 阶段 awareness:unaware → problem-aware → solution-aware → product-aware → most-aware。前 3 阶段(冷流量)直接推'立即购买'是浪费,该用 lead magnet(电子书、清单、白皮书)先教育;后 2 阶段(热流量,搜索意图明确)才推 marketing offer 和 hard CTA。原理:offer 温度必须匹配 channel 温度。Amazon 站外引流到 Listing 一样:Display/YouTube 冷流量来,Listing 上半部要先解决'这是什么、能解决我什么问题',下半部 A+ 才放硬卖点。
quote_en: You do not want to be communicating your marketing offer in the first three phases which are the unaware phase, problem aware phase and solution aware phase. Over here it's way better to work with a lead magnet to introduce your solution to a problem.

title_zh: 看 MER 不要看单平台 ROAS
summary_zh: 多平台投放时(Google + Meta + TikTok + Reddit)每个平台都会说自己 ROAS 好,把数据加起来才发现总收入不及预期——平台普遍 over-attribute 自家功劳。Miles 用 Northbeam 等三方工具看 Media Efficiency Ratio(总广告支出 / 总收入),并坚持每天登录 Shopify 看真实昨日收入对照广告花费。Amazon 同理:跑 SD/SP + 站外引流 + DSP 时,只看 ACOS 会被骗,要看 TACOS / 总销售额对总广告支出的比例,否则会以为在赚钱实际在亏。
quote_en: Google's gonna say we got a good roas, Facebook is going to say we've got good roas, TikTok is even going to say we've got good roas, and then if you combine all that data then sooner or later you're gonna find out that you thought you had more revenue against the cost you're getting.

title_zh: Performance Max 起步预算最低 100 美元/天
summary_zh: Liam 实战经验:P-Max 单一 campaign 同时跑 search/shopping/display/YouTube/Gmail/discovery 七个网络,日预算低于 100 美元会把流量分摊到饿死,前 4-5 周还有 rocky learning period。建议要么准备好 100 美金/天熬过学习期,要么跑常规 search campaign 起步。Amazon SP/SD 同样适用:自动投放/产品定向 campaign 起步预算太低会卡住学习期,跑不出成交数据。
quote_en: Have enough budget behind it to go ahead and spill it out into all those different kind of networks because otherwise you're just going to choke it. Got to make sure at least a hundred dollars a day on budget.

title_zh: Broad match 必须独立 campaign + 每天看 search term
summary_zh: Liam 反对在主 campaign 用 broad match,但建议起一个独立 campaign 给小预算专门跑 broad match,绑定 negative keyword list,每天看 search terms 报告捞出真正转化好的词,反向加回 phrase/exact match 主 campaign。这是低风险的关键词探索手法。Amazon SP 自动投放完全是同样思路:用自动投放挖掘新词,挖到的转化词加进手动投放,自动投放保留作为持续探索。
quote_en: Start out its own campaign with its own dedicated budget and set it to just broad match keywords and kind of import the negative keyword list. Just sit on that account every single day go through those search terms and actually find those keywords that are really performing.

title_zh: 出价策略先 max conversions 累积 30 单再切 tROAS
summary_zh: Liam 与 Jyll 一致经验:电商出价不能一上来就用 target ROAS/target CPA,机器学习没数据会被限制器卡死,直接零流量。先用 maximize conversions 跑到 30 天内 30-50 单再切目标类策略。Amazon SP 同理:新建 campaign 先用动态出价 down only 或固定出价喂数据,转化数据沉淀够后再切 ACoS 目标或 RoAS 目标。
quote_en: Start off with like a max conversions for ecommerce and then after you keep getting about 30 to 50 conversions a month over a 30-day period that's when you kind of start to turn on those target ROAS or a target CPA.

title_zh: 竞品对标必须看 SERP 不是后台
summary_zh: Liam 直言:大多数广告投手把时间花在后台改设置,但真正的 ad copy 优化要去 google 实际搜你出价的关键词,看竞品 headline/description/site link extension,然后逐项 one-up。空泛卖点("5 stars since 1973")没人 care,要打用户真实痛点(蜘蛛在房间想立刻除掉)。Amazon listing 同理:打开 SERP 看竞品标题/主图/A+,逐句对标用户搜该词时真实的 intent。
quote_en: Go out onto the search engine and Google what keywords you're actually presenting on. You want to be looking at your competitors their ad copy and seeing how they're addressing the market. People spend way too much time in the back end of Google playing with all the buttons.

title_zh: P-Max 跑 lead-gen 必须传质量信号回 Google
summary_zh: P-Max 容易出量但 lead 质量差,这不是 P-Max 的锅,是 conversion tracking 没设好。做法:lead form 加资格问题(预算/服务类型),合格 lead 跳 thank-you-A,不合格跳 thank-you-B,只把合格 lead 当 conversion 回传,不合格的勾掉 "include in optimization"。机器学习只优化合格 lead。Amazon 同样:Sponsored Ads 应优化的是 NTB 订单或高客单产品,而不是所有点击转化。
quote_en: If they answer the right question and say your budget's over ten thousand dollars a month we'll send them to thank you page A and if it's under we send them to thank you page B. So you're only sending the conversions back of the leads that are qualified.

title_zh: Smart Campaign 是黑箱坑,新账号一定要切 Expert mode
summary_zh: Google 新账号默认逼你建 Smart Campaign(Jyll 直接叫 "dumb campaign"),拿不到关键词/出价/网络的可见度,有 agency 看到客户在 smart campaign 烧 1-2 万美金都不知道钱花到哪。务必切 Expert mode 才能逐项控制 spend。Amazon 类比:Sponsored Display Audience 自动定向虽然方便但不透明,要尽量用 Sponsored Products 关键词手动投放,可控可优化。
quote_en: There's so many times that I've gone ahead and jumped into an account and they'll still be on the smart campaign and they'll be spending 10 20 grand and I'm like okay cool we have no control over this kind of system at the moment we can't even see where your dollars and cents are kind of being spent.

title_zh: 竞品 conquesting 投放必须配 vs comparison 落地页
summary_zh: Jyll 教学:在搜竞品词时投广告别只改 ad copy 把流量打到首页,quality score 会很低导致 CPC 飞涨。要做 "我们 vs 竞品" 比较页,relevance 拉满。同时 conquesting 仅对已访问过自家网站的用户开(RLSA),纯陌生用户在竞品搜索词上不会被竞品名转化过来,纯烧钱。Amazon SP 类比:对竞品 ASIN 出价定向时,自家 listing 主图必须明显呈现差异化(对比卡或独立卖点)。
quote_en: If you're just sending them straight to your home page and the only thing you've changed is a bit of ad copy you're going to have a really low quality score because you're not being seen as relevant and your cost per click is going to be through the roof. So throwing that little comparison page on top will really make that stuff on fire.

title_zh: 投放是即时出量但盈利要 3 个月预期管理
summary_zh: Jyll 与 Liam 共识:Google ads 开就来量,但 "流量即时" ≠ "转化和利润即时"。新账号需要 3 个月学习期把流量调到目标 CPA/ROAS,前期波动大客户不能慌。Liam 自家 agency 强制 90 天最低合作期 + 100% 退款保证。Amazon 同理:新品/新 campaign 不能拿前 14 天数据下结论,至少看 30-90 天的 trend 再判断要砍要加预算。
quote_en: The traffic is instant that doesn't mean that the conversions and the profitability are instant and that can take time. Within my own agency we actually have a three-month minimum of people coming on board because people do get scared within those first few months and they see that traffic kind of going up and down.

title_zh: DSA + RLSA 用搜索召回老访客,复购成本压到几分钱
summary_zh: Liam 头号电商 hack:Dynamic Search Ads 配 Remarketing List 组合使用。先靠 brand/shopping/P-Max 把人引到网站,被 tagged。然后 DSA+RLSA campaign 在 google search 守株待兔,只对访问过你网站、又在搜任何相关词的用户出广告,带回站点几乎是 cents on the dollar。Amazon 没有 RTG 概念,但相似思路是 Sponsored Display 的 Views Remarketing 对 7-30 天看过 listing 的用户重新触达。
quote_en: DSA plus RLSA so that's a dynamic search ads with a remarketing list attached to that. This DSA plus RLSA campaign will go out onto the Google search platform and kind of sit out there and just wait for somebody that's been to your website already and then to type something else.

title_zh: Search impression share 失分先看是 budget 还是 rank
summary_zh: Jyll 推荐 search impression share 维持至少 10%,失分时不能盲调,要在 keyword 层级加两列:"lost IS due to budget" 和 "lost IS due to rank"。budget 失分→加预算或砍地理/关键词缩小定向;rank 失分→quality score 太低或出价太低,先看 quality score 再决定改 ad copy / 落地页 / 提价。Amazon 类比:广告位失分先看是不是 budget cap 限制还是出价不够,不要乱加预算。
quote_en: I recommend your campaign has at least 10 impression share if you're not sure why you're losing impression share you want to add two columns you want to add how much you're losing due to budget and how much you're losing due to rank if you're losing more due to budget add more budget.

title_zh: 高曝光低点击的页面先改 metadata 再说
summary_zh: Kirsten SEO 实操:Google Search Console 里筛 "impressions 高 + clicks 低" 的页面是最容易拿到的 quick win——曝光说明已经在排名,点击低意味着 metadata(title/description)对用户没吸引力。改 metadata 不是长期解,但能立刻把现有排名变现。Amazon 完全适用:listing 已被搜索结果展示但 CTR 低,先改主图和标题(SERP 视觉元素),再去优化更深层的 A+ 内容。
quote_en: If you go on search console you're able to see what pages people are seeing they have high impressions but they have low clicks. Those are easy wins that is the you fix the metadata for that page. It's not a long-term solution but it will let you start getting more people on your site.

title_zh: Conversion rate × AOV < 2 美元就别投 paid 广告
summary_zh: Jyll 给电商小卖家硬规则:转化率 × 平均订单金额低于 2 美元的店铺不要烧广告,因为这两数据决定了你能承受的 max CPC——CPC 大概率会高于这数字。先做 SEO/organic 把转化率拉上去再投广告。Amazon 类比:listing 自然 CR 低于 5-8%(品类基准)、平均客单不到 20 美金时,SP 广告烧出来 ACoS 必然爆掉,先优化 listing 转化再投放。
quote_en: Unless your conversion rate times your average order value is at least two dollars don't run ads focus on SEO instead.

title_zh: 电商 shopping ads 起步预算 30 美元/天,SKU 多就翻倍
summary_zh: Jyll 给 shopping ads 的最低预算建议:本地小店、单 SKU 至少 30 美元/天 × 30 天起步。多 SKU/多品类/全国投放 shopping 是自动定向无关键词控制,需要更多预算让算法学习。Amazon 类比:Sponsored Products 自动投放在多 ASIN 时也要按 SKU 数量乘预算,不然算法只能学到头部 1-2 个 SKU。
quote_en: Shopping ads are automated you don't pick your keywords and with automated campaign types you generally need to spend more. If you're one of these businesses that only has one or two products a handful of skus and you're going local not national that maybe thirty dollars a day is a starting point.

title_zh: YouTube 视频广告 ABCD 框架直接迁移到 Amazon Video Ads
summary_zh: Google 自家创意框架 ABCD(Attract/Brand/Connect/Direct):前 5 秒紧凑画面+人脸吸引;前 5 秒必须出现品牌(视觉+音频);用故事/情绪让用户共鸣;最后给明确 CTA 与紧迫感。Amazon Sponsored Brand Video / DSP 视频创意完全可以套这套——前 3 秒钩子+品牌露出+核心卖点+"Add to Cart" CTA,可直接提升广告转化。
quote_en: YouTube's own framework for creating great ads is called ABCD attract brand connect direct. Attract is about hooking your audience in from the start tight framing fast-paced human faces. Brand is about putting your brand front and center introduce it in the first five seconds.

title_zh: 搜索关键词可直接复用作为 YouTube 受众
summary_zh: Google YouTube ads 有个常被忽视的功能:用 search keywords 反向定向 YouTube 受众——用户在 google 搜过这些词的人会在 YouTube 看到广告。这是用 high-intent search 信号驱动 awareness/Top of funnel 视频展示的实战手法。Amazon 没有跨场景搜索→视频投放,但思路提示:Sponsored Brand Video 关键词应优先选已被 SP 验证转化的高 ROAS 词,而不是凭空猜测。
quote_en: You can target people based on what they're searching for on Google so you can actually repurpose your search keywords as YouTube audiences. Can target based on what kind of apps or websites people use then you can create combinations of all those audiences.

title_zh: 用 UTM 参数区分付费/自然/邮件流量来源
summary_zh: Jyll 解释 UTM 三要素:source(tiktok/instagram/google)、medium(organic/paid/email/referral)、campaign(自定义活动名)。重点:跨平台投广告时(如 Facebook ads)不加 utm_medium=cpc,Google Analytics 会把付费流量记成 organic referral,无法区分。Amazon 卖家在站外引流(网红/红人/邮件)到 Amazon listing 时,attribution link 同样要加 UTM-style sub-tag,否则无法判断哪条 channel 真正带来转化。
quote_en: If you're running facebook ads and you don't put in custom utm parameters then all the people who come to your website from ads will look the exact same in google analytics as people who came organically. We don't want that so in facebook ads you would want to put a custom medium of cpc cost per click.

title_zh: Traffic 不是问题,conversion 才是——先修转化率再加预算
summary_zh: 电商主理人讲述自己 Shopify 店从 0.07% 转化率(near-zero)爬到 1.5% 的实战:她的诊断是流量从来不缺,缺的是转化承接。所以她先不加投放预算,而是上 live chat、reviews、scarcity 等 trust-building apps 把转化率拉起来。对应 Amazon:不要看到 SP 出单不理想就加 bid 加预算,先去检查 PDP 的 main image / A+ / reviews 是否在拉低转化,把 listing 修好再 scale 投放。
quote_en: Traffic was never a problem for me it was always conversion. My conversion rate i think was like point zero seven or so i mean it was just awful and now i'm i think 1.5 which for not even a year in business is really impressive.

title_zh: Day-1 就装 reviews/live-chat/scarcity——别等六个月
summary_zh: 她的复盘是不应该等到第六个月才上 trust-building 工具,从 day-1 就该铺好 reviews app(社会证明)、low-stock 提醒(scarcity)、live chat(异议处理)。这些 trust signal 各自只动几个百分点,但叠加起来对 conversion 是质变。Amazon 对应:新品期就要规划好 vine 评论、Q&A 内容、A+ 模块、品牌故事,别上完链接才补,前两周流量+评论权重 window 错过了再补成本翻倍。
quote_en: Have reviews from day one have live chat from day one right start building that connection interest and your conversions. If you're thinking about opening a store put them in from day one like don't wait six months.

title_zh: Low-stock 显示 = scarcity 心理,直接拉转化
summary_zh: 她装的 low-scarcity app 阈值设为 5:库存降到 5 件时商品页自动闪烁显示 'Only 5 left'(包含 4 / 3 / 2 自动倒数)。客户反馈直接说 'glad I got the last one' 或 'I'll grab two so my friend can have one'——稀缺性触发即时购买决策,避免用户 bookmark 后流失。对应 Amazon:listing bullet point 可以提稀缺性钩子(限时 / 限量),Sponsored Brand 视频也能强调稀缺,但库存数本身 Amazon 系统不主动展示,需自己写文案触发同样的紧迫感。
quote_en: When a product one of my inventory gets down to five the low scarcity app goes up so when you go to the product page it flashes and toggles and it says low stock only five left. Customers have reached out and said oh i'm so glad i got the last one.
